---
title: "Untitled"
author: "binta saji john"
date: "2026-05-25"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


```{r}
library(AER)
data("NMES1988")
data1=NMES1988
View(data1)
mean(data1$visits)
var(data1$visits)
```

##train&test


```{r}
#========================================
# LOAD PACKAGES
#========================================

library(pscl)
library(forecast)
library(caret)

#========================================
# CREATE 100 STRATIFIED SPLITS
#========================================

set.seed(123)

split_70 <- list()

split_80 <- list()

split_90 <- list()

#========================================
# GENERATE SPLITS
#========================================

for(i in 1:100){

  #------------------------------------
  # 70 : 30 SPLIT
  #------------------------------------

  idx1 <- createDataPartition(

    data1$visits,

    p = 0.70,

    list = FALSE
  )

  train_1 <- data1[idx1, ]

  test_1 <- data1[-idx1, ]

  split_70[[i]] <- list(

    train = train_1,

    test = test_1
  )

  #------------------------------------
  # 80 : 20 SPLIT
  #------------------------------------

  idx2 <- createDataPartition(

    data1$visits,

    p = 0.80,

    list = FALSE
  )

  train_2 <- data1[idx2, ]

  test_2 <- data1[-idx2, ]

  split_80[[i]] <- list(

    train = train_2,

    test = test_2
  )

  #------------------------------------
  # 90 : 10 SPLIT
  #------------------------------------

  idx3 <- createDataPartition(

    data1$visits,

    p = 0.90,

    list = FALSE
  )

  train_3 <- data1[idx3, ]

  test_3 <- data1[-idx3, ]

  split_90[[i]] <- list(

    train = train_3,

    test = test_3
  )
}

```


#ZIP



```{r}

#========================================
# STORAGE
#========================================

results_zip1 <- data.frame()

#========================================
# 10 REPLICATIONS
#========================================

set.seed(123)

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")

  cat("ZIP1 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")

  cat("====================================\n")

  #====================================
  # CREATE 70:30 SPLIT
  #====================================

  train_id <- sample(

    1:nrow(data1),

    0.70 * nrow(data1)
  )

  train_1 <- data1[train_id, ]

  test_1 <- data1[-train_id, ]

  #====================================
  # REMOVE MISSING VALUES
  #====================================

  train_1 <- na.omit(train_1)

  test_1 <- na.omit(test_1)

  #====================================
  # FIT ZIP MODEL
  #====================================

  zip_1 <- tryCatch(

    zeroinfl(

      visits ~ . |

        health + insurance + income + age,

      data = train_1,

      dist = "poisson"
    ),

    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  #====================================
  # SKIP FAILED SPLITS
  #====================================

  if(is.null(zip_1)) next

  #====================================
  # PREDICTIONS
  #====================================

  pred_zip1 <- tryCatch(

    predict(

      zip_1,

      newdata = test_1,

      type = "response"
    ),

    error = function(e){

      rep(

        mean(train_1$visits),

        nrow(test_1)
      )
    }
  )

  #====================================
  # ACTUAL VALUES
  #====================================

  actual1 <- test_1$visits

  #====================================
  # REMOVE INVALID VALUES
  #====================================

  pred_zip1 <- as.numeric(
    pred_zip1
  )

  min_len <- min(

    length(actual1),

    length(pred_zip1)
  )

  actual1 <- actual1[
    1:min_len
  ]

  pred_zip1 <- pred_zip1[
    1:min_len
  ]

  keep <- complete.cases(

    actual1,

    pred_zip1
  )

  actual1 <- actual1[keep]

  pred_zip1 <- pred_zip1[keep]

  #====================================
  # SAFE METRICS
  #====================================

  acc_zip1 <- forecast::accuracy(
  pred_zip1,
  actual1
)

acc_zip1
  #====================================
  # TRAIN PREDICTIONS
  #====================================

  train_pred_zip1 <- predict(

    zip_1,

    newdata = train_1,

    type = "response"
  )

  #====================================
  # RESIDUALS
  #====================================

  resid_zip1 <- (

    train_1$visits -

      train_pred_zip1
  )

  #====================================
  # RESIDUAL BOOTSTRAP PI
  #====================================

  B <- 1000

  pred_matrix_zip1 <- matrix(

    NA,

    nrow = length(pred_zip1),

    ncol = B
  )

  for(b in 1:B){

    sampled_resid1 <- sample(

      resid_zip1,

      size = length(pred_zip1),

      replace = TRUE
    )

    pred_matrix_zip1[, b] <- (

      pred_zip1 +

        sampled_resid1
    )
  }

  #====================================
  # PI
  #====================================

  lower_zip1 <- apply(

    pred_matrix_zip1,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.025
  )

  upper_zip1 <- apply(

    pred_matrix_zip1,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.975
  )

  #====================================
  # ROUNDING
  #====================================

  lower_zip1 <- pmax(

    0,

    round(lower_zip1)
  )

  upper_zip1 <- round(

    upper_zip1
  )

  #====================================
  # COVERAGE
  #====================================

  coverage_zip1 <- mean(

    actual1 >= lower_zip1 &

    actual1 <= upper_zip1
  )

  #====================================
  # WIDTH
  #====================================

  width_zip1 <- mean(

    upper_zip1 -

      lower_zip1
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE SPLIT RESULTS
  #====================================

  split_zip1 <- data.frame(

    Actual = actual1,

    Predicted = pred_zip1,

    Lower_PI = lower_zip1,

    Upper_PI = upper_zip1
  )

  assign(

    paste0(
      "ZIP1_SPLIT_",
      i
    ),

    split_zip1
  )

  

  #====================================
  # DISPLAY
  #====================================

  cat(
    "Coverage :",
    coverage_zip1,
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "Width :",
    width_zip1,
    "\n"
  )
}




```
#80

```{r}
#========================================
# STORAGE
#========================================

results_zip2 <- data.frame()

#========================================
# 10 REPLICATIONS
#========================================

set.seed(123)

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")

  cat("ZIP2 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")

  cat("====================================\n")

  #====================================
  # CREATE 80:20 SPLIT
  #====================================

  train_id <- sample(

    1:nrow(data1),

    0.80 * nrow(data1)
  )

  train_2 <- data1[train_id, ]

  test_2 <- data1[-train_id, ]

  #====================================
  # REMOVE MISSING VALUES
  #====================================

  train_2 <- na.omit(train_2)

  test_2 <- na.omit(test_2)

  #====================================
  # FIT ZIP MODEL
  #====================================

  zip_2 <- tryCatch(

    zeroinfl(

      visits ~ . |

        health + insurance + income + age,

      data = train_2,

      dist = "poisson"
    ),

    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  #====================================
  # SKIP FAILED SPLITS
  #====================================

  if(is.null(zip_2)) next

  #====================================
  # PREDICTIONS
  #====================================

  pred_zip2 <- tryCatch(

    predict(

      zip_2,

      newdata = test_2,

      type = "response"
    ),

    error = function(e){

      rep(

        mean(train_2$visits),

        nrow(test_2)
      )
    }
  )

  #====================================
  # ACTUAL VALUES
  #====================================

  actual2 <- test_2$visits

  #====================================
  # REMOVE INVALID VALUES
  #====================================

  pred_zip2 <- as.numeric(
    pred_zip2
  )

  min_len <- min(

    length(actual2),

    length(pred_zip2)
  )

  actual2 <- actual2[
    1:min_len
  ]

  pred_zip2 <- pred_zip2[
    1:min_len
  ]

  keep <- complete.cases(

    actual2,

    pred_zip2
  )

  actual2 <- actual2[keep]

  pred_zip2 <- pred_zip2[keep]

  #====================================
  # SAFE METRICS
  #====================================

 acc_zip2 <- forecast::accuracy(
  pred_zip2,
  actual2
)

acc_zip2

  #====================================
  # TRAIN PREDICTIONS
  #====================================

  train_pred_zip2 <- predict(

    zip_2,

    newdata = train_2,

    type = "response"
  )

  #====================================
  # RESIDUALS
  #====================================

  resid_zip2 <- (

    train_2$visits -

      train_pred_zip2
  )

  #====================================
  # RESIDUAL BOOTSTRAP PI
  #====================================

  B <- 1000

  pred_matrix_zip2 <- matrix(

    NA,

    nrow = length(pred_zip2),

    ncol = B
  )

  for(b in 1:B){

    sampled_resid2 <- sample(

      resid_zip2,

      size = length(pred_zip2),

      replace = TRUE
    )

    pred_matrix_zip2[, b] <- (

      pred_zip2 +

        sampled_resid2
    )
  }

  #====================================
  # PI
  #====================================

  lower_zip2 <- apply(

    pred_matrix_zip2,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.025
  )

  upper_zip2 <- apply(

    pred_matrix_zip2,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.975
  )

  #====================================
  # ROUNDING
  #====================================

  lower_zip2 <- pmax(

    0,

    round(lower_zip2)
  )

  upper_zip2 <- round(

    upper_zip2
  )

  #====================================
  # COVERAGE
  #====================================

  coverage_zip2 <- mean(

    actual2 >= lower_zip2 &

    actual2 <= upper_zip2
  )

  #====================================
  # WIDTH
  #====================================

  width_zip2 <- mean(

    upper_zip2 -

      lower_zip2
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE SPLIT RESULTS
  #====================================

  split_zip2 <- data.frame(

    Actual = actual2,

    Predicted = pred_zip2,

    Lower_PI = lower_zip2,

    Upper_PI = upper_zip2
  )

  assign(

    paste0(
      "ZIP2_SPLIT_",
      i
    ),

    split_zip2
  )

  
  #====================================
  # DISPLAY
  #====================================

  cat(
    "Coverage :",
    coverage_zip2,
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "Width :",
    width_zip2,
    "\n"
  )
}

#========================================
# FINAL RESULTS
#========================================

results_zip2

```


#90
```{r}
#========================================
# STORAGE
#========================================

results_zip3 <- data.frame()

#========================================
# 10 REPLICATIONS
#========================================

set.seed(123)

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")

  cat("ZIP3 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")

  cat("====================================\n")

  #====================================
  # CREATE 90:10 SPLIT
  #====================================

  train_id <- sample(

    1:nrow(data1),

    0.90 * nrow(data1)
  )

  train_3 <- data1[train_id, ]

  test_3 <- data1[-train_id, ]

  #====================================
  # REMOVE MISSING VALUES
  #====================================

  train_3 <- na.omit(train_3)

  test_3 <- na.omit(test_3)

  #====================================
  # FIT ZIP MODEL
  #====================================

  zip_3 <- tryCatch(

    zeroinfl(

      visits ~ . |

        health + insurance + income + age,

      data = train_3,

      dist = "poisson"
    ),

    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  #====================================
  # SKIP FAILED SPLITS
  #====================================

  if(is.null(zip_3)) next

  #====================================
  # PREDICTIONS
  #====================================

  pred_zip3 <- tryCatch(

    predict(

      zip_3,

      newdata = test_3,

      type = "response"
    ),

    error = function(e){

      rep(

        mean(train_3$visits),

        nrow(test_3)
      )
    }
  )

  #====================================
  # ACTUAL VALUES
  #====================================

  actual3 <- test_3$visits
  
  acc_zip3 <- forecast::accuracy(
  pred_zip3,
  actual3)

acc_zip3


  #====================================
  # REMOVE INVALID VALUES
  #====================================

  pred_zip3 <- as.numeric(
    pred_zip3
  )

  min_len <- min(

    length(actual3),

    length(pred_zip3)
  )

  actual3 <- actual3[
    1:min_len
  ]

  pred_zip3 <- pred_zip3[
    1:min_len
  ]

  keep <- complete.cases(

    actual3,

    pred_zip3
  )

  actual3 <- actual3[keep]

  pred_zip3 <- pred_zip3[keep]

  #====================================
  # SAFE METRICS
  #====================================

  

  train_pred_zip3 <- predict(

    zip_3,

    newdata = train_3,

    type = "response"
  )

  #====================================
  # RESIDUALS
  #====================================

  resid_zip3 <- (

    train_3$visits -

      train_pred_zip3
  )

  #====================================
  # RESIDUAL BOOTSTRAP PI
  #====================================

  B <- 1000

  pred_matrix_zip3 <- matrix(

    NA,

    nrow = length(pred_zip3),

    ncol = B
  )

  for(b in 1:B){

    sampled_resid3 <- sample(

      resid_zip3,

      size = length(pred_zip3),

      replace = TRUE
    )

    pred_matrix_zip3[, b] <- (

      pred_zip3 +

        sampled_resid3
    )
  }

  #====================================
  # PI
  #====================================

  lower_zip3 <- apply(

    pred_matrix_zip3,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.025
  )

  upper_zip3 <- apply(

    pred_matrix_zip3,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.975
  )

  #====================================
  # ROUNDING
  #====================================

  lower_zip3 <- pmax(

    0,

    round(lower_zip3)
  )

  upper_zip3 <- round(

    upper_zip3
  )

  #====================================
  # COVERAGE
  #====================================

  coverage_zip3 <- mean(

    actual3 >= lower_zip3 &

    actual3 <= upper_zip3
  )

  #====================================
  # WIDTH
  #====================================

  width_zip3 <- mean(

    upper_zip3 -

      lower_zip3
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE SPLIT RESULTS
  #====================================

  split_zip3 <- data.frame(

    Actual = actual3,

    Predicted = pred_zip3,

    Lower_PI = lower_zip3,

    Upper_PI = upper_zip3
  )

  assign(

    paste0(
      "ZIP3_SPLIT_",
      i
    ),

    split_zip3
  )


  #====================================
  # DISPLAY
  #====================================

  cat(
    "Coverage :",
    coverage_zip3,
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "Width :",
    width_zip3,
    "\n"
  )
}


```



##HURDLE-POISSON

```{r}
#========================================
# STORAGE
#========================================

results_hpoi1 <- data.frame()

#========================================
# 10 REPLICATIONS
#========================================

set.seed(123)

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")

  cat("HURDLE POISSON 1 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")

  cat("====================================\n")

  #====================================
  # CREATE 70:30 SPLIT
  #====================================

  train_id <- sample(

    1:nrow(data1),

    0.70 * nrow(data1)
  )

  train_1 <- data1[train_id, ]

  test_1 <- data1[-train_id, ]

  #====================================
  # REMOVE MISSING VALUES
  #====================================

  train_1 <- na.omit(train_1)

  test_1 <- na.omit(test_1)

  #====================================
  # FIT HURDLE POISSON MODEL
  #====================================

  hurdle_poi1 <- tryCatch(

    hurdle(

      visits ~ income + age |

        health + insurance,

      data = train_1,

      dist = "poisson"
    ),

    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  #====================================
  # SKIP FAILED SPLITS
  #====================================

  if(is.null(hurdle_poi1)) next

  #====================================
  # PREDICTIONS
  #====================================

  pred_hpoi1 <- tryCatch(

    predict(

      hurdle_poi1,

      newdata = test_1,

      type = "response"
    ),

    error = function(e){

      rep(

        mean(train_1$visits),

        nrow(test_1)
      )
    }
  )

  #====================================
  # ACTUAL VALUES
  #====================================

  actual1 <- test_1$visits

  #====================================
  # REMOVE INVALID VALUES
  #====================================

  pred_hpoi1 <- as.numeric(
    pred_hpoi1
  )

  min_len <- min(

    length(actual1),

    length(pred_hpoi1)
  )

  actual1 <- actual1[
    1:min_len
  ]

  pred_hpoi1 <- pred_hpoi1[
    1:min_len
  ]

  keep <- complete.cases(

    actual1,

    pred_hpoi1
  )

  actual1 <- actual1[keep]

  pred_hpoi1 <- pred_hpoi1[keep]

  #====================================
  # SAFE METRICS
  #====================================

  
acc_hpoi1 <- as.data.frame(
  accuracy(pred_hpoi1, actual1)
)

acc_hpoi1

  #====================================
  # TRAIN PREDICTIONS
  #====================================

  train_pred_hpoi1 <- predict(

    hurdle_poi1,

    newdata = train_1,

    type = "response"
  )

  #====================================
  # RESIDUALS
  #====================================

  resid_hpoi1 <- (

    train_1$visits -

      train_pred_hpoi1
  )

  #====================================
  # RESIDUAL BOOTSTRAP PI
  #====================================

  B <- 1000

  pred_matrix_hpoi1 <- matrix(

    NA,

    nrow = length(pred_hpoi1),

    ncol = B
  )

  for(b in 1:B){

    sampled_resid1 <- sample(

      resid_hpoi1,

      size = length(pred_hpoi1),

      replace = TRUE
    )

    pred_matrix_hpoi1[, b] <- (

      pred_hpoi1 +

        sampled_resid1
    )
  }

  #====================================
  # PI
  #====================================

  lower_hpoi1 <- apply(

    pred_matrix_hpoi1,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.025
  )

  upper_hpoi1 <- apply(

    pred_matrix_hpoi1,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.975
  )

  #====================================
  # ROUNDING
  #====================================

  lower_hpoi1 <- pmax(

    0,

    round(lower_hpoi1)
  )

  upper_hpoi1 <- round(

    upper_hpoi1
  )

  #====================================
  # COVERAGE
  #====================================

  coverage_hpoi1 <- mean(

    actual1 >= lower_hpoi1 &

    actual1 <= upper_hpoi1
  )

  #====================================
  # WIDTH
  #====================================

  width_hpoi1 <- mean(

    upper_hpoi1 -

      lower_hpoi1
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE SPLIT RESULTS
  #====================================

  split_hpoi1 <- data.frame(

    Actual = actual1,

    Predicted = pred_hpoi1,

    Lower_PI = lower_hpoi1,

    Upper_PI = upper_hpoi1
  )

  assign(

    paste0(
      "HPOI1_SPLIT_",
      i
    ),

    split_hpoi1
  )

  

  #====================================
  # DISPLAY
  #====================================

  cat(
    "Coverage :",
    coverage_hpoi1,
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "Width :",
    width_hpoi1,
    "\n"
  )
}


```

#80

```{r}
#========================================
# STORAGE
#========================================

results_hpoi2 <- data.frame()

#========================================
# 10 REPLICATIONS
#========================================

set.seed(123)

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")

  cat("HURDLE POISSON 2 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")

  cat("====================================\n")

  #====================================
  # CREATE 80:20 SPLIT
  #====================================

  train_id <- sample(

    1:nrow(data1),

    0.80 * nrow(data1)
  )

  train_2 <- data1[train_id, ]

  test_2 <- data1[-train_id, ]

  #====================================
  # REMOVE MISSING VALUES
  #====================================

  train_2 <- na.omit(train_2)

  test_2 <- na.omit(test_2)

  #====================================
  # FIT HURDLE POISSON MODEL
  #====================================

  hurdle_poi2 <- tryCatch(

    hurdle(

      visits ~ income + age |

        health + insurance,

      data = train_2,

      dist = "poisson"
    ),

    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  #====================================
  # SKIP FAILED SPLITS
  #====================================

  if(is.null(hurdle_poi2)) next

  #====================================
  # PREDICTIONS
  #====================================

  pred_hpoi2 <- tryCatch(

    predict(

      hurdle_poi2,

      newdata = test_2,

      type = "response"
    ),

    error = function(e){

      rep(

        mean(train_2$visits),

        nrow(test_2)
      )
    }
  )

  #====================================
  # ACTUAL VALUES
  #====================================

  actual2 <- test_2$visits

  #====================================
  # REMOVE INVALID VALUES
  #====================================

  pred_hpoi2 <- as.numeric(
    pred_hpoi2
  )

  min_len <- min(

    length(actual2),

    length(pred_hpoi2)
  )

  actual2 <- actual2[
    1:min_len
  ]

  pred_hpoi2 <- pred_hpoi2[
    1:min_len
  ]

  keep <- complete.cases(

    actual2,

    pred_hpoi2
  )

  actual2 <- actual2[keep]

  pred_hpoi2 <- pred_hpoi2[keep]

  #====================================
  # SAFE METRICS
  #====================================

  acc_hpoi2 <- as.data.frame(
  accuracy(pred_hpoi2, actual2)
)

acc_hpoi2
  #====================================
  # TRAIN PREDICTIONS
  #====================================

  train_pred_hpoi2 <- predict(

    hurdle_poi2,

    newdata = train_2,

    type = "response"
  )

  #====================================
  # RESIDUALS
  #====================================

  resid_hpoi2 <- (

    train_2$visits -

      train_pred_hpoi2
  )

  #====================================
  # RESIDUAL BOOTSTRAP PI
  #====================================

  B <- 1000

  pred_matrix_hpoi2 <- matrix(

    NA,

    nrow = length(pred_hpoi2),

    ncol = B
  )

  for(b in 1:B){

    sampled_resid2 <- sample(

      resid_hpoi2,

      size = length(pred_hpoi2),

      replace = TRUE
    )

    pred_matrix_hpoi2[, b] <- (

      pred_hpoi2 +

        sampled_resid2
    )
  }

  #====================================
  # PI
  #====================================

  lower_hpoi2 <- apply(

    pred_matrix_hpoi2,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.025
  )

  upper_hpoi2 <- apply(

    pred_matrix_hpoi2,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.975
  )

  #====================================
  # ROUNDING
  #====================================

  lower_hpoi2 <- pmax(

    0,

    round(lower_hpoi2)
  )

  upper_hpoi2 <- round(

    upper_hpoi2
  )

  #====================================
  # COVERAGE
  #====================================

  coverage_hpoi2 <- mean(

    actual2 >= lower_hpoi2 &

    actual2 <= upper_hpoi2
  )

  #====================================
  # WIDTH
  #====================================

  width_hpoi2 <- mean(

    upper_hpoi2 -

      lower_hpoi2
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE SPLIT RESULTS
  #====================================

  split_hpoi2 <- data.frame(

    Actual = actual2,

    Predicted = pred_hpoi2,

    Lower_PI = lower_hpoi2,

    Upper_PI = upper_hpoi2
  )

  assign(

    paste0(
      "HPOI2_SPLIT_",
      i
    ),

    split_hpoi2
  )

 
  #====================================
  # DISPLAY
  #====================================

  cat(
    "Coverage :",
    coverage_hpoi2,
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "Width :",
    width_hpoi2,
    "\n"
  )
}




```

#90
```{r}
#========================================
# STORAGE
#========================================

results_hpoi3 <- data.frame()

#========================================
# 10 REPLICATIONS
#========================================

set.seed(123)

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")

  cat("HURDLE POISSON 3 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")

  cat("====================================\n")

  #====================================
  # CREATE 90:10 SPLIT
  #====================================

  train_id <- sample(

    1:nrow(data1),

    0.90 * nrow(data1)
  )

  train_3 <- data1[train_id, ]

  test_3 <- data1[-train_id, ]

  #====================================
  # REMOVE MISSING VALUES
  #====================================

  train_3 <- na.omit(train_3)

  test_3 <- na.omit(test_3)

  #====================================
  # FIT HURDLE POISSON MODEL
  #====================================

  hurdle_poi3 <- tryCatch(

    hurdle(

      visits ~ income + age |

        health + insurance,

      data = train_3,

      dist = "poisson"
    ),

    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  #====================================
  # SKIP FAILED SPLITS
  #====================================

  if(is.null(hurdle_poi3)) next

  #====================================
  # PREDICTIONS
  #====================================

  pred_hpoi3 <- tryCatch(

    predict(

      hurdle_poi3,

      newdata = test_3,

      type = "response"
    ),

    error = function(e){

      rep(

        mean(train_3$visits),

        nrow(test_3)
      )
    }
  )

  #====================================
  # ACTUAL VALUES
  #====================================

  actual3 <- test_3$visits

  #====================================
  # REMOVE INVALID VALUES
  #====================================

  pred_hpoi3 <- as.numeric(
    pred_hpoi3
  )

  min_len <- min(

    length(actual3),

    length(pred_hpoi3)
  )

  actual3 <- actual3[
    1:min_len
  ]

  pred_hpoi3 <- pred_hpoi3[
    1:min_len
  ]

  keep <- complete.cases(

    actual3,

    pred_hpoi3
  )

  actual3 <- actual3[keep]

  pred_hpoi3 <- pred_hpoi3[keep]

  #====================================
  # SAFE METRICS
  #====================================

 acc_hpoi3 <- as.data.frame(
  accuracy(pred_hpoi3, actual3)
)

acc_hpoi3

  #====================================
  # TRAIN PREDICTIONS
  #====================================

  train_pred_hpoi3 <- predict(

    hurdle_poi3,

    newdata = train_3,

    type = "response"
  )

  #====================================
  # RESIDUALS
  #====================================

  resid_hpoi3 <- (

    train_3$visits -

      train_pred_hpoi3
  )

  #====================================
  # RESIDUAL BOOTSTRAP PI
  #====================================

  B <- 1000

  pred_matrix_hpoi3 <- matrix(

    NA,

    nrow = length(pred_hpoi3),

    ncol = B
  )

  for(b in 1:B){

    sampled_resid3 <- sample(

      resid_hpoi3,

      size = length(pred_hpoi3),

      replace = TRUE
    )

    pred_matrix_hpoi3[, b] <- (

      pred_hpoi3 +

        sampled_resid3
    )
  }

  #====================================
  # PI
  #====================================

  lower_hpoi3 <- apply(

    pred_matrix_hpoi3,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.025
  )

  upper_hpoi3 <- apply(

    pred_matrix_hpoi3,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.975
  )

  #====================================
  # ROUNDING
  #====================================

  lower_hpoi3 <- pmax(

    0,

    round(lower_hpoi3)
  )

  upper_hpoi3 <- round(

    upper_hpoi3
  )

  #====================================
  # COVERAGE
  #====================================

  coverage_hpoi3 <- mean(

    actual3 >= lower_hpoi3 &

    actual3 <= upper_hpoi3
  )

  #====================================
  # WIDTH
  #====================================

  width_hpoi3 <- mean(

    upper_hpoi3 -

      lower_hpoi3
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE SPLIT RESULTS
  #====================================

  split_hpoi3 <- data.frame(

    Actual = actual3,

    Predicted = pred_hpoi3,

    Lower_PI = lower_hpoi3,

    Upper_PI = upper_hpoi3
  )

  assign(

    paste0(
      "HPOI3_SPLIT_",
      i
    ),

    split_hpoi3
  )

  

  #====================================
  # DISPLAY
  #====================================

  cat(
    "Coverage :",
    coverage_hpoi3,
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "Width :",
    width_hpoi3,
    "\n"
  )
}

```


#ZINB

```{r}
#========================================
# STORAGE
#========================================

results_zinb1 <- data.frame()

#========================================
# 10 REPLICATIONS
#========================================

set.seed(123)

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")

  cat("ZINB1 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")

  cat("====================================\n")

  #====================================
  # CREATE 70:30 SPLIT
  #====================================

  train_id <- sample(

    1:nrow(data1),

    0.70 * nrow(data1)
  )

  train_1 <- data1[train_id, ]

  test_1 <- data1[-train_id, ]

  #====================================
  # REMOVE MISSING VALUES
  #====================================

  train_1 <- na.omit(train_1)

  test_1 <- na.omit(test_1)

  #====================================
  # FIT ZINB MODEL
  #====================================

  zinb_1 <- tryCatch(

    zeroinfl(

      visits ~ . |

        health + insurance + income + age,

      data = train_1,

      dist = "negbin"
    ),

    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  #====================================
  # SKIP FAILED SPLITS
  #====================================

  if(is.null(zinb_1)) next

  #====================================
  # TEST PREDICTIONS
  #====================================

  pred_zinb1 <- tryCatch(

    predict(

      zinb_1,

      newdata = test_1,

      type = "response"
    ),

    error = function(e){

      rep(

        mean(train_1$visits),

        nrow(test_1)
      )
    }
  )

  #====================================
  # TRAIN PREDICTIONS
  #====================================

  train_pred_zinb1 <- predict(

    zinb_1,

    newdata = train_1,

    type = "response"
  )

  #====================================
  # ACTUAL VALUES
  #====================================

  actual1 <- test_1$visits

  #====================================
  # REMOVE INVALID VALUES
  #====================================

  pred_zinb1 <- as.numeric(
    pred_zinb1
  )

  min_len <- min(

    length(actual1),

    length(pred_zinb1)
  )

  actual1 <- actual1[
    1:min_len
  ]

  pred_zinb1 <- pred_zinb1[
    1:min_len
  ]

  keep <- complete.cases(

    actual1,

    pred_zinb1
  )

  actual1 <- actual1[keep]

  pred_zinb1 <- pred_zinb1[keep]

  #====================================
  # SAFE METRICS
  #====================================

  library(forecast)

acc_zinb1 <- as.data.frame(
  accuracy(pred_zinb1, actual1)
)

acc_zinb1

  #====================================
  # RESIDUALS
  #====================================

  resid_zinb1 <- (

    train_1$visits -

      train_pred_zinb1
  )

  #====================================
  # NUMBER OF BOOTSTRAPS
  #====================================

  B <- 1000

  #====================================
  # STORAGE MATRIX
  #====================================

  boot_zinb1 <- matrix(

    NA,

    nrow = length(pred_zinb1),

    ncol = B
  )

  #====================================
  # RESIDUAL BOOTSTRAP
  #====================================

  for(b in 1:B){

    sampled_resid1 <- sample(

      resid_zinb1,

      length(pred_zinb1),

      replace = TRUE
    )

    boot_zinb1[, b] <- (

      pred_zinb1 +

        sampled_resid1
    )
  }

  #====================================
  # NON-NEGATIVE COUNTS
  #====================================

  boot_zinb1[
    boot_zinb1 < 0
  ] <- 0

  #====================================
  # ROUNDING
  #====================================

  boot_zinb1 <- round(

    boot_zinb1
  )

  #====================================
  # PREDICTION INTERVALS
  #====================================

  lower_zinb1 <- apply(

    boot_zinb1,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.025
  )

  upper_zinb1 <- apply(

    boot_zinb1,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.975
  )

  #====================================
  # COVERAGE
  #====================================

  coverage_zinb1 <- mean(

    actual1 >= lower_zinb1 &

    actual1 <= upper_zinb1
  )

  #====================================
  # WIDTH
  #====================================

  width_zinb1 <- mean(

    upper_zinb1 -

      lower_zinb1
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE SPLIT RESULTS
  #====================================

  split_zinb1 <- data.frame(

    Actual = actual1,

    Predicted = pred_zinb1,

    Lower_PI = lower_zinb1,

    Upper_PI = upper_zinb1
  )

  assign(

    paste0(
      "ZINB1_SPLIT_",
      i
    ),

    split_zinb1
  )

  

  #====================================
  # DISPLAY
  #====================================

  cat(
    "Coverage :",
    coverage_zinb1,
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "Width :",
    width_zinb1,
    "\n"
  )
}


```
#80
```{r}

#========================================
# STORAGE
#========================================

results_zinb2 <- data.frame()

#========================================
# 10 REPLICATIONS
#========================================

set.seed(123)

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")

  cat("ZINB2 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")

  cat("====================================\n")

  #====================================
  # CREATE 80:20 SPLIT
  #====================================

  train_id <- sample(

    1:nrow(data1),

    0.80 * nrow(data1)
  )

  train_2 <- data1[train_id, ]

  test_2 <- data1[-train_id, ]

  #====================================
  # REMOVE MISSING VALUES
  #====================================

  train_2 <- na.omit(train_2)

  test_2 <- na.omit(test_2)

  #====================================
  # FIT ZINB MODEL
  #====================================

  zinb_2 <- tryCatch(

    zeroinfl(

      visits ~ . |

        health + insurance + income + age,

      data = train_2,

      dist = "negbin"
    ),

    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  #====================================
  # SKIP FAILED SPLITS
  #====================================

  if(is.null(zinb_2)) next

  #====================================
  # TEST PREDICTIONS
  #====================================

  pred_zinb2 <- tryCatch(

    predict(

      zinb_2,

      newdata = test_2,

      type = "response"
    ),

    error = function(e){

      rep(

        mean(train_2$visits),

        nrow(test_2)
      )
    }
  )

  #====================================
  # TRAIN PREDICTIONS
  #====================================

  train_pred_zinb2 <- predict(

    zinb_2,

    newdata = train_2,

    type = "response"
  )

  #====================================
  # ACTUAL VALUES
  #====================================

  actual2 <- test_2$visits

  #====================================
  # REMOVE INVALID VALUES
  #====================================

  pred_zinb2 <- as.numeric(
    pred_zinb2
  )

  min_len <- min(

    length(actual2),

    length(pred_zinb2)
  )

  actual2 <- actual2[
    1:min_len
  ]

  pred_zinb2 <- pred_zinb2[
    1:min_len
  ]

  keep <- complete.cases(

    actual2,

    pred_zinb2
  )

  actual2 <- actual2[keep]

  pred_zinb2 <- pred_zinb2[keep]

  #====================================
  # SAFE METRICS
  #====================================

  acc_zinb2 <- as.data.frame(
  accuracy(pred_zinb2, actual2)
)

acc_zinb2
  #====================================
  # RESIDUALS
  #====================================

  resid_zinb2 <- (

    train_2$visits -

      train_pred_zinb2
  )

  #====================================
  # NUMBER OF BOOTSTRAPS
  #====================================

  B <- 1000

  #====================================
  # STORAGE MATRIX
  #====================================

  boot_zinb2 <- matrix(

    NA,

    nrow = length(pred_zinb2),

    ncol = B
  )

  #====================================
  # RESIDUAL BOOTSTRAP
  #====================================

  for(b in 1:B){

    sampled_resid2 <- sample(

      resid_zinb2,

      length(pred_zinb2),

      replace = TRUE
    )

    boot_zinb2[, b] <- (

      pred_zinb2 +

        sampled_resid2
    )
  }

  #====================================
  # NON-NEGATIVE COUNTS
  #====================================

  boot_zinb2[
    boot_zinb2 < 0
  ] <- 0

  #====================================
  # ROUNDING
  #====================================

  boot_zinb2 <- round(

    boot_zinb2
  )

  #====================================
  # PREDICTION INTERVALS
  #====================================

  lower_zinb2 <- apply(

    boot_zinb2,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.025
  )

  upper_zinb2 <- apply(

    boot_zinb2,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.975
  )

  #====================================
  # COVERAGE
  #====================================

  coverage_zinb2 <- mean(

    actual2 >= lower_zinb2 &

    actual2 <= upper_zinb2
  )

  #====================================
  # WIDTH
  #====================================

  width_zinb2 <- mean(

    upper_zinb2 -

      lower_zinb2
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE SPLIT RESULTS
  #====================================

  split_zinb2 <- data.frame(

    Actual = actual2,

    Predicted = pred_zinb2,

    Lower_PI = lower_zinb2,

    Upper_PI = upper_zinb2
  )

  assign(

    paste0(
      "ZINB2_SPLIT_",
      i
    ),

    split_zinb2
  )

  
  #====================================
  # DISPLAY
  #====================================

  cat(
    "Coverage :",
    coverage_zinb2,
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "Width :",
    width_zinb2,
    "\n"
  )
}

```
#90
```{r}

#========================================
# STORAGE
#========================================

results_zinb3 <- data.frame()

#========================================
# 10 REPLICATIONS
#========================================

set.seed(123)

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")

  cat("ZINB3 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")

  cat("====================================\n")

  #====================================
  # CREATE 90:10 SPLIT
  #====================================

  train_id <- sample(

    1:nrow(data1),

    0.90 * nrow(data1)
  )

  train_3 <- data1[train_id, ]

  test_3 <- data1[-train_id, ]

  #====================================
  # REMOVE MISSING VALUES
  #====================================

  train_3 <- na.omit(train_3)

  test_3 <- na.omit(test_3)

  #====================================
  # FIT ZINB MODEL
  #====================================

  zinb_3 <- tryCatch(

    zeroinfl(

      visits ~ . |

        health + insurance + income + age,

      data = train_3,

      dist = "negbin"
    ),

    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  #====================================
  # SKIP FAILED SPLITS
  #====================================

  if(is.null(zinb_3)) next

  #====================================
  # TEST PREDICTIONS
  #====================================

  pred_zinb3 <- tryCatch(

    predict(

      zinb_3,

      newdata = test_3,

      type = "response"
    ),

    error = function(e){

      rep(

        mean(train_3$visits),

        nrow(test_3)
      )
    }
  )

  #====================================
  # TRAIN PREDICTIONS
  #====================================

  train_pred_zinb3 <- predict(

    zinb_3,

    newdata = train_3,

    type = "response"
  )

  #====================================
  # ACTUAL VALUES
  #====================================

  actual3 <- test_3$visits

  #====================================
  # REMOVE INVALID VALUES
  #====================================

  pred_zinb3 <- as.numeric(
    pred_zinb3
  )

  min_len <- min(

    length(actual3),

    length(pred_zinb3)
  )

  actual3 <- actual3[
    1:min_len
  ]

  pred_zinb3 <- pred_zinb3[
    1:min_len
  ]

  keep <- complete.cases(

    actual3,

    pred_zinb3
  )

  actual3 <- actual3[keep]

  pred_zinb3 <- pred_zinb3[keep]

  #====================================
  # SAFE METRICS
  #====================================

  acc_zinb3 <- as.data.frame(
  accuracy(pred_zinb3, actual3)
)

acc_zinb3

  #====================================
  # RESIDUALS
  #====================================

  resid_zinb3 <- (

    train_3$visits -

      train_pred_zinb3
  )

  #====================================
  # NUMBER OF BOOTSTRAPS
  #====================================

  B <- 1000

  #====================================
  # STORAGE MATRIX
  #====================================

  boot_zinb3 <- matrix(

    NA,

    nrow = length(pred_zinb3),

    ncol = B
  )

  #====================================
  # RESIDUAL BOOTSTRAP
  #====================================

  for(b in 1:B){

    sampled_resid3 <- sample(

      resid_zinb3,

      length(pred_zinb3),

      replace = TRUE
    )

    boot_zinb3[, b] <- (

      pred_zinb3 +

        sampled_resid3
    )
  }

  #====================================
  # NON-NEGATIVE COUNTS
  #====================================

  boot_zinb3[
    boot_zinb3 < 0
  ] <- 0

  #====================================
  # ROUNDING
  #====================================

  boot_zinb3 <- round(

    boot_zinb3
  )

  #====================================
  # PREDICTION INTERVALS
  #====================================

  lower_zinb3 <- apply(

    boot_zinb3,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.025
  )

  upper_zinb3 <- apply(

    boot_zinb3,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.975
  )

  #====================================
  # COVERAGE
  #====================================

  coverage_zinb3 <- mean(

    actual3 >= lower_zinb3 &

    actual3 <= upper_zinb3
  )

  #====================================
  # WIDTH
  #====================================

  width_zinb3 <- mean(

    upper_zinb3 -

      lower_zinb3
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE SPLIT RESULTS
  #====================================

  split_zinb3 <- data.frame(

    Actual = actual3,

    Predicted = pred_zinb3,

    Lower_PI = lower_zinb3,

    Upper_PI = upper_zinb3
  )

  assign(

    paste0(
      "ZINB3_SPLIT_",
      i
    ),

    split_zinb3
  )

 
  #====================================
  # DISPLAY
  #====================================

  cat(
    "Coverage :",
    coverage_zinb3,
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "Width :",
    width_zinb3,
    "\n"
  )
}

```


#NB-HURDLE
```{r}
#========================================
# STORAGE
#========================================

results_hnb1 <- data.frame()

#========================================
# 10 REPLICATIONS
#========================================

set.seed(123)

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")

  cat("HNB1 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")

  cat("====================================\n")

  #====================================
  # CREATE 70:30 SPLIT
  #====================================

  train_id <- sample(

    1:nrow(data1),

    0.70 * nrow(data1)
  )

  train_1 <- data1[train_id, ]

  test_1 <- data1[-train_id, ]

  #====================================
  # REMOVE MISSING VALUES
  #====================================

  train_1 <- na.omit(train_1)

  test_1 <- na.omit(test_1)

  #====================================
  # FIT HURDLE NB MODEL
  #====================================

  hurdle_nb1 <- tryCatch(

    hurdle(

      visits ~ health + insurance + income + age |

        health + insurance,

      data = train_1,

      dist = "negbin"
    ),

    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  #====================================
  # SKIP FAILED SPLITS
  #====================================

  if(is.null(hurdle_nb1)) next

  #====================================
  # TEST PREDICTIONS
  #====================================

  hurdle_nb_pr1 <- tryCatch(

    predict(

      hurdle_nb1,

      newdata = test_1,

      type = "response"
    ),

    error = function(e){

      rep(

        mean(train_1$visits),

        nrow(test_1)
      )
    }
  )

  #====================================
  # TRAIN PREDICTIONS
  #====================================

  train_pred_hnb1 <- predict(

    hurdle_nb1,

    newdata = train_1,

    type = "response"
  )

  #====================================
  # ACTUAL VALUES
  #====================================

  actual1 <- test_1$visits

  #====================================
  # REMOVE INVALID VALUES
  #====================================

  hurdle_nb_pr1 <- as.numeric(
    hurdle_nb_pr1
  )

  min_len <- min(

    length(actual1),

    length(hurdle_nb_pr1)
  )

  actual1 <- actual1[
    1:min_len
  ]

  hurdle_nb_pr1 <- hurdle_nb_pr1[
    1:min_len
  ]

  keep <- complete.cases(

    actual1,

    hurdle_nb_pr1
  )

  actual1 <- actual1[keep]

  hurdle_nb_pr1 <- hurdle_nb_pr1[keep]

  #====================================
  # SAFE METRICS
  #====================================
acc_hnb1 <- as.data.frame(
  accuracy(hurdle_nb_pr1, actual1)
)

acc_hnb1

  

  #====================================
  # RESIDUALS
  #====================================

  resid_hnb1 <- (

    train_1$visits -

      train_pred_hnb1
  )

  #====================================
  # NUMBER OF BOOTSTRAPS
  #====================================

  B <- 1000

  #====================================
  # STORAGE MATRIX
  #====================================

  boot_hnb1 <- matrix(

    NA,

    nrow = length(hurdle_nb_pr1),

    ncol = B
  )

  #====================================
  # RESIDUAL BOOTSTRAP
  #====================================

  for(b in 1:B){

    sampled_resid1 <- sample(

      resid_hnb1,

      length(hurdle_nb_pr1),

      replace = TRUE
    )

    boot_hnb1[, b] <- (

      hurdle_nb_pr1 +

        sampled_resid1
    )
  }

  #====================================
  # NON-NEGATIVE COUNTS
  #====================================

  boot_hnb1[
    boot_hnb1 < 0
  ] <- 0

  #====================================
  # ROUNDING
  #====================================

  boot_hnb1 <- round(

    boot_hnb1
  )

  #====================================
  # PREDICTION INTERVALS
  #====================================

  lower_hnb1 <- apply(

    boot_hnb1,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.025
  )

  upper_hnb1 <- apply(

    boot_hnb1,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.975
  )

  #====================================
  # COVERAGE
  #====================================

  coverage_hnb1 <- mean(

    actual1 >= lower_hnb1 &

    actual1 <= upper_hnb1
  )

  #====================================
  # WIDTH
  #====================================

  width_hnb1 <- mean(

    upper_hnb1 -

      lower_hnb1
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE SPLIT RESULTS
  #====================================

  split_hnb1 <- data.frame(

    Actual = actual1,

    Predicted = hurdle_nb_pr1,

    Lower_PI = lower_hnb1,

    Upper_PI = upper_hnb1
  )

  assign(

    paste0(
      "HNB1_SPLIT_",
      i
    ),

    split_hnb1
  )

  #====================================
  # DISPLAY
  #====================================

  cat(
    "Coverage :",
    coverage_hnb1,
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "Width :",
    width_hnb1,
    "\n"
  )
}


```

#80

```{r}
#========================================
# STORAGE
#========================================

results_hnb2 <- data.frame()

#========================================
# 10 REPLICATIONS
#========================================

set.seed(123)

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")

  cat("HNB2 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")

  cat("====================================\n")

  #====================================
  # CREATE 80:20 SPLIT
  #====================================

  train_id <- sample(

    1:nrow(data1),

    0.80 * nrow(data1)
  )

  train_2 <- data1[train_id, ]

  test_2 <- data1[-train_id, ]

  #====================================
  # REMOVE MISSING VALUES
  #====================================

  train_2 <- na.omit(train_2)

  test_2 <- na.omit(test_2)

  #====================================
  # FIT HURDLE NB MODEL
  #====================================

  hurdle_nb2 <- tryCatch(

    hurdle(

      visits ~ health + insurance + income + age |

        health + insurance,

      data = train_2,

      dist = "negbin"
    ),

    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  #====================================
  # SKIP FAILED SPLITS
  #====================================

  if(is.null(hurdle_nb2)) next

  #====================================
  # TEST PREDICTIONS
  #====================================

  hurdle_nb_pr2 <- tryCatch(

    predict(

      hurdle_nb2,

      newdata = test_2,

      type = "response"
    ),

    error = function(e){

      rep(

        mean(train_2$visits),

        nrow(test_2)
      )
    }
  )

  #====================================
  # TRAIN PREDICTIONS
  #====================================

  train_pred_hnb2 <- predict(

    hurdle_nb2,

    newdata = train_2,

    type = "response"
  )

  #====================================
  # ACTUAL VALUES
  #====================================

  actual2 <- test_2$visits

  #====================================
  # REMOVE INVALID VALUES
  #====================================

  hurdle_nb_pr2 <- as.numeric(
    hurdle_nb_pr2
  )

  min_len <- min(

    length(actual2),

    length(hurdle_nb_pr2)
  )

  actual2 <- actual2[
    1:min_len
  ]

  hurdle_nb_pr2 <- hurdle_nb_pr2[
    1:min_len
  ]

  keep <- complete.cases(

    actual2,

    hurdle_nb_pr2
  )

  actual2 <- actual2[keep]

  hurdle_nb_pr2 <- hurdle_nb_pr2[keep]

  #====================================
  # SAFE METRICS
  #====================================

  acc_hnb2 <- as.data.frame(
  accuracy(hurdle_nb_pr2, actual2)
)

acc_hnb2

  #====================================
  # RESIDUALS
  #====================================

  resid_hnb2 <- (

    train_2$visits -

      train_pred_hnb2
  )

  #====================================
  # NUMBER OF BOOTSTRAPS
  #====================================

  B <- 1000

  #====================================
  # STORAGE MATRIX
  #====================================

  boot_hnb2 <- matrix(

    NA,

    nrow = length(hurdle_nb_pr2),

    ncol = B
  )

  #====================================
  # RESIDUAL BOOTSTRAP
  #====================================

  for(b in 1:B){

    sampled_resid2 <- sample(

      resid_hnb2,

      length(hurdle_nb_pr2),

      replace = TRUE
    )

    boot_hnb2[, b] <- (

      hurdle_nb_pr2 +

        sampled_resid2
    )
  }

  #====================================
  # NON-NEGATIVE COUNTS
  #====================================

  boot_hnb2[
    boot_hnb2 < 0
  ] <- 0

  #====================================
  # ROUNDING
  #====================================

  boot_hnb2 <- round(

    boot_hnb2
  )

  #====================================
  # PREDICTION INTERVALS
  #====================================

  lower_hnb2 <- apply(

    boot_hnb2,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.025
  )

  upper_hnb2 <- apply(

    boot_hnb2,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.975
  )

  #====================================
  # COVERAGE
  #====================================

  coverage_hnb2 <- mean(

    actual2 >= lower_hnb2 &

    actual2 <= upper_hnb2
  )

  #====================================
  # WIDTH
  #====================================

  width_hnb2 <- mean(

    upper_hnb2 -

      lower_hnb2
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE SPLIT RESULTS
  #====================================

  split_hnb2 <- data.frame(

    Actual = actual2,

    Predicted = hurdle_nb_pr2,

    Lower_PI = lower_hnb2,

    Upper_PI = upper_hnb2
  )

  assign(

    paste0(
      "HNB2_SPLIT_",
      i
    ),

    split_hnb2
  )

  

  #====================================
  # DISPLAY
  #====================================

  cat(
    "Coverage :",
    coverage_hnb2,
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "Width :",
    width_hnb2,
    "\n"
  )
}


```

90
```{r}

#========================================
# STORAGE
#========================================

results_hnb3 <- data.frame()

#========================================
# 10 REPLICATIONS
#========================================

set.seed(123)

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")

  cat("HNB3 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")

  cat("====================================\n")

  #====================================
  # CREATE 90:10 SPLIT
  #====================================

  train_id <- sample(

    1:nrow(data1),

    0.90 * nrow(data1)
  )

  train_3 <- data1[train_id, ]

  test_3 <- data1[-train_id, ]

  #====================================
  # REMOVE MISSING VALUES
  #====================================

  train_3 <- na.omit(train_3)

  test_3 <- na.omit(test_3)

  #====================================
  # FIT HURDLE NB MODEL
  #====================================

  hurdle_nb3 <- tryCatch(

    hurdle(

      visits ~ health + insurance + income + age |

        health + insurance,

      data = train_3,

      dist = "negbin"
    ),

    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  #====================================
  # SKIP FAILED SPLITS
  #====================================

  if(is.null(hurdle_nb3)) next

  #====================================
  # TEST PREDICTIONS
  #====================================

  hurdle_nb_pr3 <- tryCatch(

    predict(

      hurdle_nb3,

      newdata = test_3,

      type = "response"
    ),

    error = function(e){

      rep(

        mean(train_3$visits),

        nrow(test_3)
      )
    }
  )

  #====================================
  # TRAIN PREDICTIONS
  #====================================

  train_pred_hnb3 <- predict(

    hurdle_nb3,

    newdata = train_3,

    type = "response"
  )

  #====================================
  # ACTUAL VALUES
  #====================================

  actual3 <- test_3$visits

  #====================================
  # REMOVE INVALID VALUES
  #====================================

  hurdle_nb_pr3 <- as.numeric(
    hurdle_nb_pr3
  )

  min_len <- min(

    length(actual3),

    length(hurdle_nb_pr3)
  )

  actual3 <- actual3[
    1:min_len
  ]

  hurdle_nb_pr3 <- hurdle_nb_pr3[
    1:min_len
  ]

  keep <- complete.cases(

    actual3,

    hurdle_nb_pr3
  )

  actual3 <- actual3[keep]

  hurdle_nb_pr3 <- hurdle_nb_pr3[keep]

  #====================================
  # SAFE METRICS
  #====================================

 acc_hnb3 <- as.data.frame(
  accuracy(hurdle_nb_pr3, actual3)
)

acc_hnb3

  #====================================
  # RESIDUALS
  #====================================

  resid_hnb3 <- (

    train_3$visits -

      train_pred_hnb3
  )

  #====================================
  # NUMBER OF BOOTSTRAPS
  #====================================

  B <- 1000

  #====================================
  # STORAGE MATRIX
  #====================================

  boot_hnb3 <- matrix(

    NA,

    nrow = length(hurdle_nb_pr3),

    ncol = B
  )

  #====================================
  # RESIDUAL BOOTSTRAP
  #====================================

  for(b in 1:B){

    sampled_resid3 <- sample(

      resid_hnb3,

      length(hurdle_nb_pr3),

      replace = TRUE
    )

    boot_hnb3[, b] <- (

      hurdle_nb_pr3 +

        sampled_resid3
    )
  }

  #====================================
  # NON-NEGATIVE COUNTS
  #====================================

  boot_hnb3[
    boot_hnb3 < 0
  ] <- 0

  #====================================
  # ROUNDING
  #====================================

  boot_hnb3 <- round(

    boot_hnb3
  )

  #====================================
  # PREDICTION INTERVALS
  #====================================

  lower_hnb3 <- apply(

    boot_hnb3,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.025
  )

  upper_hnb3 <- apply(

    boot_hnb3,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.975
  )

  #====================================
  # COVERAGE
  #====================================

  coverage_hnb3 <- mean(

    actual3 >= lower_hnb3 &

    actual3 <= upper_hnb3
  )

  #====================================
  # WIDTH
  #====================================

  width_hnb3 <- mean(

    upper_hnb3 -

      lower_hnb3
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE SPLIT RESULTS
  #====================================

  split_hnb3 <- data.frame(

    Actual = actual3,

    Predicted = hurdle_nb_pr3,

    Lower_PI = lower_hnb3,

    Upper_PI = upper_hnb3
  )

  assign(

    paste0(
      "HNB3_SPLIT_",
      i
    ),

    split_hnb3
  )

  
  #====================================
  # DISPLAY
  #====================================

  cat(
    "Coverage :",
    coverage_hnb3,
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "Width :",
    width_hnb3,
    "\n"
  )
}


  
```
#90

```{r}
results_hnb3 <- data.frame()

set.seed(123)

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("HNB3 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  train_id <- sample(
    1:nrow(data1),
    0.90 * nrow(data1)
  )

  train_3 <- data1[train_id, ]
  test_3  <- data1[-train_id, ]

  train_3 <- na.omit(train_3)
  test_3  <- na.omit(test_3)

  hurdle_nb3 <- tryCatch(

    hurdle(
      visits ~ health + insurance + income + age |
        health + insurance,
      data = train_3,
      dist = "negbin"
    ),

    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  if(is.null(hurdle_nb3)) next

  hurdle_nb_pr3 <- tryCatch(

    predict(
      hurdle_nb3,
      newdata = test_3,
      type = "response"
    ),

    error = function(e){
      rep(
        mean(train_3$visits),
        nrow(test_3)
      )
    }
  )

  train_pred_hnb3 <- predict(
    hurdle_nb3,
    newdata = train_3,
    type = "response"
  )

  actual3 <- test_3$visits

  hurdle_nb_pr3 <- as.numeric(hurdle_nb_pr3)

  min_len <- min(
    length(actual3),
    length(hurdle_nb_pr3)
  )

  actual3 <- actual3[1:min_len]
  hurdle_nb_pr3 <- hurdle_nb_pr3[1:min_len]

  keep <- complete.cases(
    actual3,
    hurdle_nb_pr3
  )

  actual3 <- actual3[keep]
  hurdle_nb_pr3 <- hurdle_nb_pr3[keep]

  acc_hnb3 <- as.data.frame(
    forecast::accuracy(
      hurdle_nb_pr3,
      actual3
    )
  )

  resid_hnb3 <- (
    train_3$visits -
      train_pred_hnb3
  )

  B <- 1000

  boot_hnb3 <- matrix(
    NA,
    nrow = length(hurdle_nb_pr3),
    ncol = B
  )

  for(b in 1:B){

    sampled_resid3 <- sample(
      resid_hnb3,
      length(hurdle_nb_pr3),
      replace = TRUE
    )

    boot_hnb3[, b] <- (
      hurdle_nb_pr3 +
        sampled_resid3
    )
  }

  boot_hnb3[boot_hnb3 < 0] <- 0

  boot_hnb3 <- round(boot_hnb3)

  lower_hnb3 <- apply(
    boot_hnb3,
    1,
    quantile,
    probs = 0.025
  )

  upper_hnb3 <- apply(
    boot_hnb3,
    1,
    quantile,
    probs = 0.975
  )

  coverage_hnb3 <- mean(
    actual3 >= lower_hnb3 &
      actual3 <= upper_hnb3
  )

  width_hnb3 <- mean(
    upper_hnb3 -
      lower_hnb3
  )

  split_hnb3 <- data.frame(
    Actual = actual3,
    Predicted = hurdle_nb_pr3,
    Lower_PI = lower_hnb3,
    Upper_PI = upper_hnb3
  )

  assign(
    paste0(
      "HNB3_SPLIT_",
      i
    ),
    split_hnb3
  )

  results_hnb3 <- rbind(
    results_hnb3,
    data.frame(
      Replication = i,
      Coverage = coverage_hnb3,
      Width = width_hnb3,
      ME = acc_hnb3["Test set","ME"],
      RMSE = acc_hnb3["Test set","RMSE"],
      MAE = acc_hnb3["Test set","MAE"],
      MAPE = acc_hnb3["Test set","MAPE"]
    )
  )

  cat("Coverage :", coverage_hnb3, "\n")
  cat("Width :", width_hnb3, "\n")
}
```


#ZILNB- HURDLE
```{r}
#========================================
# LOAD PACKAGE
#========================================

library(glmmTMB)

#========================================
# STORAGE
#========================================

results_zilnb1 <- data.frame()

#========================================
# 100 REPLICATIONS
#========================================

set.seed(123)

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")

  cat("ZILNB1 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")

  cat("====================================\n")

  #====================================
  # CREATE 70:30 SPLIT
  #====================================

  train_id1 <- sample(

    1:nrow(data1),

    0.70 * nrow(data1)
  )

  train_1 <- data1[train_id1, ]

  test_1 <- data1[-train_id1, ]

  #====================================
  # REMOVE MISSING VALUES
  #====================================

  train_1 <- na.omit(train_1)

  test_1 <- na.omit(test_1)

  #====================================
  # FIT MODEL
  #====================================

  hurdle_ZILNB1 <- tryCatch(

    glmmTMB(

      visits ~ age + income +
        insurance + health,

      ziformula =
        ~ hospital + insurance,

      family = nbinom1,

      data = train_1
    ),

    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  #====================================
  # SKIP FAILED SPLITS
  #====================================

  if(is.null(hurdle_ZILNB1)) next

  #====================================
  # TEST PREDICTIONS
  #====================================

  hurdle_ZILNB_pr1 <- predict(

    hurdle_ZILNB1,

    newdata = test_1,

    type = "response"
  )

  #====================================
  # TRAIN PREDICTIONS
  #====================================

  train_pred_zilnb1 <- predict(

    hurdle_ZILNB1,

    newdata = train_1,

    type = "response"
  )

  #====================================
  # RESIDUALS
  #====================================

  resid_zilnb1 <- (

    train_1$visits -

      train_pred_zilnb1
  )

  #====================================
  # NUMBER OF BOOTSTRAPS
  #====================================

  B <- 1000

  #====================================
  # STORAGE MATRIX
  #====================================

  boot_zilnb1 <- matrix(

    NA,

    nrow = nrow(test_1),

    ncol = B
  )

  #====================================
  # RESIDUAL BOOTSTRAP
  #====================================

  for(b in 1:B){

    sampled_resid1 <- sample(

      resid_zilnb1,

      nrow(test_1),

      replace = TRUE
    )

    boot_zilnb1[, b] <- (

      hurdle_ZILNB_pr1 +

        sampled_resid1
    )
  }

  #====================================
  # NON-NEGATIVE COUNTS
  #====================================

  boot_zilnb1[
    boot_zilnb1 < 0
  ] <- 0

  #====================================
  # ROUNDING
  #====================================

  boot_zilnb1 <- round(
    boot_zilnb1
  )

  #====================================
  # PREDICTION INTERVALS
  #====================================

  lower_zilnb1 <- apply(

    boot_zilnb1,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.025
  )

  upper_zilnb1 <- apply(

    boot_zilnb1,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.975
  )

  #====================================
  # COVERAGE
  #====================================

  coverage_zilnb1 <- mean(

    test_1$visits >= lower_zilnb1 &

      test_1$visits <= upper_zilnb1
  )

  #====================================
  # WIDTH
  #====================================

  width_zilnb1 <- mean(

    upper_zilnb1 -

      lower_zilnb1
  )

  #====================================
  # ERROR
  #====================================
acc_zilnb1 <- as.data.frame(
  accuracy(hurdle_ZILNB_pr1, test_1$visits)
)

acc_zilnb1
  

  cat(
    "Coverage =",
    coverage_zilnb1,
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "Width =",
    width_zilnb1,
    "\n"
  )
}



```

#80
```{r}
#========================================
# STORAGE
#========================================

results_zilnb2 <- data.frame()

#========================================
# 100 REPLICATIONS
#========================================

set.seed(123)

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")

  cat("ZILNB2 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")

  cat("====================================\n")

  #====================================
  # CREATE 80:20 SPLIT
  #====================================

  train_id2 <- sample(

    1:nrow(data1),

    0.80 * nrow(data1)
  )

  train_2 <- data1[train_id2, ]

  test_2 <- data1[-train_id2, ]

  #====================================
  # REMOVE MISSING VALUES
  #====================================

  train_2 <- na.omit(train_2)

  test_2 <- na.omit(test_2)

  #====================================
  # FIT MODEL
  #====================================

  hurdle_ZILNB2 <- tryCatch(

    glmmTMB(

      visits ~ age + income +
        insurance + health,

      ziformula =
        ~ hospital + insurance,

      family = nbinom1,

      data = train_2
    ),

    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  #====================================
  # SKIP FAILED SPLITS
  #====================================

  if(is.null(hurdle_ZILNB2)) next

  #====================================
  # TEST PREDICTIONS
  #====================================

  hurdle_ZILNB_pr2 <- predict(

    hurdle_ZILNB2,

    newdata = test_2,

    type = "response"
  )

  #====================================
  # TRAIN PREDICTIONS
  #====================================

  train_pred_zilnb2 <- predict(

    hurdle_ZILNB2,

    newdata = train_2,

    type = "response"
  )

  #====================================
  # RESIDUALS
  #====================================

  resid_zilnb2 <- (

    train_2$visits -

      train_pred_zilnb2
  )

  #====================================
  # NUMBER OF BOOTSTRAPS
  #====================================

  B <- 1000

  #====================================
  # STORAGE MATRIX
  #====================================

  boot_zilnb2 <- matrix(

    NA,

    nrow = nrow(test_2),

    ncol = B
  )

  #====================================
  # RESIDUAL BOOTSTRAP
  #====================================

  for(b in 1:B){

    sampled_resid2 <- sample(

      resid_zilnb2,

      nrow(test_2),

      replace = TRUE
    )

    boot_zilnb2[, b] <- (

      hurdle_ZILNB_pr2 +

        sampled_resid2
    )
  }

  #====================================
  # NON-NEGATIVE COUNTS
  #====================================

  boot_zilnb2[
    boot_zilnb2 < 0
  ] <- 0

  #====================================
  # ROUNDING
  #====================================

  boot_zilnb2 <- round(
    boot_zilnb2
  )

  #====================================
  # PREDICTION INTERVALS
  #====================================

  lower_zilnb2 <- apply(

    boot_zilnb2,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.025
  )

  upper_zilnb2 <- apply(

    boot_zilnb2,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.975
  )

  #====================================
  # COVERAGE
  #====================================

  coverage_zilnb2 <- mean(

    test_2$visits >= lower_zilnb2 &

      test_2$visits <= upper_zilnb2
  )

  #====================================
  # WIDTH
  #====================================

  width_zilnb2 <- mean(

    upper_zilnb2 -

      lower_zilnb2
  )

  #====================================
  # RMSE
  #====================================

  acc_zilnb2 <- as.data.frame(
  accuracy(hurdle_ZILNB_pr2, test_2$visits)
)

acc_zilnb2
  

  cat(
    "Coverage =",
    coverage_zilnb2,
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "Width =",
    width_zilnb2,
    "\n"
  )
}


```

#90
```{r}
#========================================
# STORAGE
#========================================

results_zilnb3 <- data.frame()

#========================================
# 100 REPLICATIONS
#========================================

set.seed(123)

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")

  cat("ZILNB3 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")

  cat("====================================\n")

  #====================================
  # CREATE 90:10 SPLIT
  #====================================

  train_id3 <- sample(

    1:nrow(data1),

    0.90 * nrow(data1)
  )

  train_3 <- data1[train_id3, ]

  test_3 <- data1[-train_id3, ]

  #====================================
  # REMOVE MISSING VALUES
  #====================================

  train_3 <- na.omit(train_3)

  test_3 <- na.omit(test_3)

  #====================================
  # FIT MODEL
  #====================================

  hurdle_ZILNB3 <- tryCatch(

    glmmTMB(

      visits ~ age + income +
        insurance + health,

      ziformula =
        ~ hospital + insurance,

      family = nbinom1,

      data = train_3
    ),

    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  #====================================
  # SKIP FAILED SPLITS
  #====================================

  if(is.null(hurdle_ZILNB3)) next

  #====================================
  # TEST PREDICTIONS
  #====================================

  hurdle_ZILNB_pr3 <- predict(

    hurdle_ZILNB3,

    newdata = test_3,

    type = "response"
  )

  #====================================
  # TRAIN PREDICTIONS
  #====================================

  train_pred_zilnb3 <- predict(

    hurdle_ZILNB3,

    newdata = train_3,

    type = "response"
  )

  #====================================
  # RESIDUALS
  #====================================

  resid_zilnb3 <- (

    train_3$visits -

      train_pred_zilnb3
  )

  #====================================
  # NUMBER OF BOOTSTRAPS
  #====================================

  B <- 1000

  #====================================
  # STORAGE MATRIX
  #====================================

  boot_zilnb3 <- matrix(

    NA,

    nrow = nrow(test_3),

    ncol = B
  )

  #====================================
  # RESIDUAL BOOTSTRAP
  #====================================

  for(b in 1:B){

    sampled_resid3 <- sample(

      resid_zilnb3,

      nrow(test_3),

      replace = TRUE
    )

    boot_zilnb3[, b] <- (

      hurdle_ZILNB_pr3 +

        sampled_resid3
    )
  }

  #====================================
  # NON-NEGATIVE COUNTS
  #====================================

  boot_zilnb3[
    boot_zilnb3 < 0
  ] <- 0

  #====================================
  # ROUNDING
  #====================================

  boot_zilnb3 <- round(
    boot_zilnb3
  )

  #====================================
  # PREDICTION INTERVALS
  #====================================

  lower_zilnb3 <- apply(

    boot_zilnb3,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.025
  )

  upper_zilnb3 <- apply(

    boot_zilnb3,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.975
  )

  #====================================
  # COVERAGE
  #====================================

  coverage_zilnb3 <- mean(

    test_3$visits >= lower_zilnb3 &

      test_3$visits <= upper_zilnb3
  )

  #====================================
  # WIDTH
  #====================================

  width_zilnb3 <- mean(

    upper_zilnb3 -

      lower_zilnb3
  )

  #====================================
  # RMSE
  #====================================

  acc_zilnb3 <- as.data.frame(
  accuracy(hurdle_ZILNB_pr3, test_3$visits)
)

acc_zilnb3

  cat(
    "Coverage =",
    coverage_zilnb3,
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "Width =",
    width_zilnb3,
    "\n"
  )
}

#========================================
# FINAL RESULTS

```


##ZIGP
```{r}
library(VGAM)
library(forecast)

#========================================
# STORAGE
#========================================

results_zipo1 <- data.frame()

#========================================
# 100 REPLICATIONS
#========================================
set.seed(123)

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("ZIPO1 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  #====================================
  # CREATE 70:30 SPLIT
  #====================================

  train_id1 <- sample(
    1:nrow(data1),
    0.70 * nrow(data1)
  )

  train_1 <- data1[train_id1, ]
  test_1  <- data1[-train_id1, ]

  train_1 <- na.omit(train_1)
  test_1  <- na.omit(test_1)

  #====================================
  # FIT MODEL
  #====================================

  ZIPO_1 <- tryCatch(

    vglm(
      visits ~ health +
        insurance +
        income +
        age,

      zipoissonff,
      data = train_1
    ),

    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  #====================================
  # SKIP FAILED SPLITS
  #====================================

  if(is.null(ZIPO_1)) next

  #====================================
  # TEST PREDICTIONS
  #====================================

  pred_zipo1 <- predict(
    ZIPO_1,
    newdata = test_1,
    type = "response"
  )

  #====================================
  # TRAIN PREDICTIONS
  #====================================

  train_pred_zipo1 <- predict(
    ZIPO_1,
    newdata = train_1,
    type = "response"
  )

  #====================================
  # RESIDUALS
  #====================================

  resid_zipo1 <- train_1$visits -
    train_pred_zipo1

  #====================================
  # NUMBER OF BOOTSTRAPS
  #====================================

  B <- 1000

  #====================================
  # STORAGE MATRIX
  #====================================

  boot_zipo1 <- matrix(
    NA,
    nrow = nrow(test_1),
    ncol = B
  )

  #====================================
  # RESIDUAL BOOTSTRAP
  #====================================

  for(b in 1:B){

    sampled_resid1 <- sample(
      resid_zipo1,
      nrow(test_1),
      replace = TRUE
    )

    boot_zipo1[, b] <-
      pred_zipo1 + sampled_resid1
  }

  #====================================
  # NON-NEGATIVE COUNTS
  #====================================

  boot_zipo1[boot_zipo1 < 0] <- 0

  #====================================
  # ROUNDING
  #====================================

  boot_zipo1 <- round(boot_zipo1)

  #====================================
  # PREDICTION INTERVALS
  #====================================

  lower_zipo1 <- apply(
    boot_zipo1,
    1,
    quantile,
    probs = 0.025
  )

  upper_zipo1 <- apply(
    boot_zipo1,
    1,
    quantile,
    probs = 0.975
  )

  #====================================
  # COVERAGE
  #====================================

  coverage_zipo1 <- mean(
    test_1$visits >= lower_zipo1 &
      test_1$visits <= upper_zipo1
  )

  #====================================
  # WIDTH
  #====================================

  width_zipo1 <- mean(
    upper_zipo1 - lower_zipo1
  )

  #====================================
  # ACCURACY MEASURES
  #====================================

  acc_zipo1 <- forecast::accuracy(
    pred_zipo1,
    test_1$visits
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE RESULTS
  #====================================

  results_zipo1 <- rbind(
    results_zipo1,
    data.frame(
      Replication = i,
      Coverage = coverage_zipo1,
      Width = width_zipo1,
      ME = acc_zipo1["Test set","ME"],
      RMSE = acc_zipo1["Test set","RMSE"],
      MAE = acc_zipo1["Test set","MAE"],
      MAPE = acc_zipo1["Test set","MAPE"]
    )
  )

  cat("Coverage =", coverage_zipo1, "\n")
  cat("Width =", width_zipo1, "\n")
}
```
