```{r}
  )

  width_rf3 <- mean(
    upper_rf3 - lower_rf3
  )

  #======================================================
  # STORE RESULTS
  #======================================================

  results_rf3 <- rbind(
    results_rf3,
    data.frame(
      Replication = i,
      Coverage = coverage_rf3,
      Width = width_rf3,
      ME = acc_rf3["Test set","ME"],
      RMSE = acc_rf3["Test set","RMSE"],
      MAE = acc_rf3["Test set","MAE"],
      MAPE = acc_rf3["Test set","MAPE"]
    )
  )
}

#========================================================
# SUMMARY
#========================================================

summary_rf3 <- data.frame(

  Mean_Coverage = mean(results_rf3$Coverage),

  Mean_Width = mean(results_rf3$Width),

  Mean_ME = mean(results_rf3$ME),

  Mean_RMSE = mean(results_rf3$RMSE),

  Mean_MAE = mean(results_rf3$MAE),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(results_rf3$MAPE)
)

summary_rf3
  
```

#Gradient-Boosting
```{r}
#========================================================
# XGBOOST COUNT MODEL
# CONFORMAL PI
# 70:30 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
#========================================================


#========================================================
# STORAGE OBJECT
#========================================================

results_xgb1 <- data.frame()

#========================================================
# REPRODUCIBILITY
#========================================================

set.seed(123)

#========================================================
# NUMBER OF REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

R <- 100

#========================================================
# START LOOP
#========================================================

for(i in 1:R){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("XGBOOST1 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  #======================================================
  # CREATE 70:30 SPLIT
  #======================================================

  train_id1 <- sample(
    1:nrow(data1),
    size = floor(0.70 * nrow(data1))
  )

  train_1 <- data1[train_id1, ]
  test_1  <- data1[-train_id1, ]

  #======================================================
  # REMOVE MISSING VALUES
  #======================================================

  train_1 <- na.omit(train_1)
  test_1  <- na.omit(test_1)

  #======================================================
  # MODEL MATRICES
  #======================================================

  X_train1 <- model.matrix(
    visits ~
      hospital +
      chronic +
      health +
      adl +
      insurance +
      income +
      age - 1,
    data = train_1
  )

  X_test1 <- model.matrix(
    visits ~
      hospital +
      chronic +
      health +
      adl +
      insurance +
      income +
      age - 1,
    data = test_1
  )

  #======================================================
  # RESPONSE
  #======================================================

  y_train1 <- train_1$visits
  actual1  <- test_1$visits

  #======================================================
  # FIT XGBOOST
  #======================================================

  xgb_model1 <- xgboost(

    x = X_train1,

    y = y_train1,

    objective = "count:poisson",

    nrounds = 100,

    learning_rate = 0.1,

    max_depth = 6,

    verbose = 0
  )

  #======================================================
  # TEST PREDICTIONS
  #======================================================

  pred_xgb1 <- predict(
    xgb_model1,
    X_test1
  )

  pred_xgb1 <- round(pred_xgb1)

  #======================================================
  # TRAIN PREDICTIONS
  #======================================================

  train_pred_xgb1 <- predict(
    xgb_model1,
    X_train1
  )

  #======================================================
  # ACCURACY MEASURES
  #======================================================

  acc_xgb1 <- as.data.frame(
    forecast::accuracy(
      pred_xgb1,
      actual1
    )
  )

  #======================================================
  # CONFORMAL RESIDUALS
  #======================================================

  resid_xgb1 <- abs(
    y_train1 -
      train_pred_xgb1
  )

  resid_xgb1 <- resid_xgb1[
    is.finite(resid_xgb1)
  ]

  #======================================================
  # 95% QUANTILE
  #======================================================

  qhat_xgb1 <- quantile(
    resid_xgb1,
    probs = 0.95,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )

  #======================================================
  # PREDICTION INTERVALS
  #======================================================

  lower_xgb1 <- pred_xgb1 - qhat_xgb1

  upper_xgb1 <- pred_xgb1 + qhat_xgb1

  #======================================================
  # NON-NEGATIVE COUNTS
  #======================================================

  lower_xgb1 <- pmax(
    0,
    round(lower_xgb1)
  )

  upper_xgb1 <- round(
    upper_xgb1
  )

  #======================================================
  # COVERAGE
  #======================================================

  coverage_xgb1 <- mean(
    actual1 >= lower_xgb1 &
      actual1 <= upper_xgb1
  )

  #======================================================
  # WIDTH
  #======================================================

  width_xgb1 <- mean(
    upper_xgb1 -
      lower_xgb1
  )

  #======================================================
  # STORE RESULTS
  #======================================================

  results_xgb1 <- rbind(

    results_xgb1,

    data.frame(

      Replication = i,

      Coverage = coverage_xgb1,

      Width = width_xgb1,

      ME = acc_xgb1["Test set","ME"],

      RMSE = acc_xgb1["Test set","RMSE"],

      MAE = acc_xgb1["Test set","MAE"],

      MAPE = acc_xgb1["Test set","MAPE"]

    )
  )

  #======================================================
  # DISPLAY
  #======================================================

  cat(
    "RMSE =",
    round(acc_xgb1["Test set","RMSE"],4),
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "MAE =",
    round(acc_xgb1["Test set","MAE"],4),
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "Coverage =",
    round(coverage_xgb1,4),
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "Width =",
    round(width_xgb1,4),
    "\n"
  )
}

#========================================================
# FINAL SUMMARY
#========================================================

summary_xgb1 <- data.frame(

  Mean_Coverage =
    mean(results_xgb1$Coverage),

  Mean_Width =
    mean(results_xgb1$Width),

  Mean_ME =
    mean(results_xgb1$ME),

  Mean_RMSE =
    mean(results_xgb1$RMSE),

  Mean_MAE =
    mean(results_xgb1$MAE),

  Mean_MAPE =
    mean(results_xgb1$MAPE)

)

summary_xgb1
```
```r
#========================================================
# LOAD PACKAGES
#========================================================

library(xgboost)
library(forecast)

#========================================================
# STORAGE OBJECT
#========================================================

results_xgb1 <- data.frame()

#========================================================
# REPRODUCIBILITY
#========================================================

set.seed(123)

#========================================================
# NUMBER OF REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

R <- 100

#========================================================
# START LOOP
#========================================================

for(i in 1:R){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("XGBOOST1 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  #======================================================
  # CREATE 70:30 SPLIT
  #======================================================

  train_id1 <- sample(
    1:nrow(data1),
    size = floor(0.70 * nrow(data1))
  )

  train_1 <- data1[train_id1, ]
  test_1  <- data1[-train_id1, ]

  #======================================================
  # REMOVE MISSING VALUES
  #======================================================

  train_1 <- na.omit(train_1)
  test_1  <- na.omit(test_1)

  #======================================================
  # MODEL MATRICES
  #======================================================

  X_train1 <- model.matrix(
    visits ~
      hospital +
      chronic +
      health +
      adl +
      insurance +
      income +
      age - 1,
    data = train_1
  )

  X_test1 <- model.matrix(
    visits ~
      hospital +
      chronic +
      health +
      adl +
      insurance +
      income +
      age - 1,
    data = test_1
  )

  #======================================================
  # RESPONSE
  #======================================================

  y_train1 <- train_1$visits
  actual1  <- test_1$visits

  #======================================================
  # FIT XGBOOST
  #======================================================

  xgb_model1 <- xgboost(

    x = X_train1,

    y = y_train1,

    objective = "count:poisson",

    nrounds = 100,

    learning_rate = 0.1,

    max_depth = 6,

    verbose = 0
  )

  #======================================================
  # TEST PREDICTIONS
  #======================================================

  pred_xgb1 <- predict(
    xgb_model1,
    X_test1
  )

  pred_xgb1 <- round(pred_xgb1)

  #======================================================
  # TRAIN PREDICTIONS
  #======================================================

  train_pred_xgb1 <- predict(
    xgb_model1,
    X_train1
  )

  #======================================================
  # ACCURACY MEASURES
  #======================================================

  acc_xgb1 <- as.data.frame(
    forecast::accuracy(
      pred_xgb1,
      actual1
    )
  )

  #======================================================
  # CONFORMAL RESIDUALS
  #======================================================

  resid_xgb1 <- abs(
    y_train1 -
      train_pred_xgb1
  )

  resid_xgb1 <- resid_xgb1[
    is.finite(resid_xgb1)
  ]

  #======================================================
  # 95% QUANTILE
  #======================================================

  qhat_xgb1 <- quantile(
    resid_xgb1,
    probs = 0.95,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )

  #======================================================
  # PREDICTION INTERVALS
  #======================================================

  lower_xgb1 <- pred_xgb1 - qhat_xgb1

  upper_xgb1 <- pred_xgb1 + qhat_xgb1

  #======================================================
  # NON-NEGATIVE COUNTS
  #======================================================

  lower_xgb1 <- pmax(
    0,
    round(lower_xgb1)
  )

  upper_xgb1 <- round(
    upper_xgb1
  )

  #======================================================
  # COVERAGE
  #======================================================

  coverage_xgb1 <- mean(
    actual1 >= lower_xgb1 &
      actual1 <= upper_xgb1
  )

  #======================================================
  # WIDTH
  #======================================================

  width_xgb1 <- mean(
    upper_xgb1 -
      lower_xgb1
  )

  #======================================================
  # STORE RESULTS
  #======================================================

  results_xgb1 <- rbind(

    results_xgb1,

    data.frame(

      Replication = i,

      Coverage = coverage_xgb1,

      Width = width_xgb1,

      ME = acc_xgb1["Test set","ME"],

      RMSE = acc_xgb1["Test set","RMSE"],

      MAE = acc_xgb1["Test set","MAE"],

      MAPE = acc_xgb1["Test set","MAPE"]

    )
  )

  #======================================================
  # DISPLAY
  #======================================================

  cat(
    "RMSE =",
    round(acc_xgb1["Test set","RMSE"],4),
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "MAE =",
    round(acc_xgb1["Test set","MAE"],4),
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "Coverage =",
    round(coverage_xgb1,4),
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "Width =",
    round(width_xgb1,4),
    "\n"
  )
}

#========================================================
# FINAL SUMMARY
#========================================================

summary_xgb1 <- data.frame(

  Mean_Coverage =
    mean(results_xgb1$Coverage),

  Mean_Width =
    mean(results_xgb1$Width),

  Mean_ME =
    mean(results_xgb1$ME),

  Mean_RMSE =
    mean(results_xgb1$RMSE),

  Mean_MAE =
    mean(results_xgb1$MAE),

  Mean_MAPE =
    mean(results_xgb1$MAPE)

)

summary_xgb1
```



#80
```{r}
#========================================================
# XGBOOST COUNT MODEL
# CONFORMAL PI
# 80:20 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
#========================================================


#========================================================
# LOAD PACKAGES
#========================================================

library(xgboost)
library(forecast)

#========================================================
# STORAGE OBJECT
#========================================================

results_xgb2 <- data.frame()

#========================================================
# REPRODUCIBILITY
#========================================================

set.seed(123)

R <- 100

#========================================================
# LOOP
#========================================================

for(i in 1:R){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("XGBOOST2 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  train_id2 <- sample(
    1:nrow(data1),
    size = floor(0.80*nrow(data1))
  )

  train_2 <- data1[train_id2, ]
  test_2  <- data1[-train_id2, ]

  train_2 <- na.omit(train_2)
  test_2  <- na.omit(test_2)

  X_train2 <- model.matrix(
    visits ~ hospital + chronic + health +
      adl + insurance + income + age - 1,
    data = train_2
  )

  X_test2 <- model.matrix(
    visits ~ hospital + chronic + health +
      adl + insurance + income + age - 1,
    data = test_2
  )

  y_train2 <- train_2$visits
  actual2  <- test_2$visits

  xgb_model2 <- xgboost(
    x = X_train2,
    y = y_train2,
    objective = "count:poisson",
    nrounds = 100,
    learning_rate = 0.1,
    max_depth = 6,
    verbose = 0
  )

  pred_xgb2 <- predict(
    xgb_model2,
    X_test2
  )

  pred_xgb2 <- round(pred_xgb2)

  train_pred_xgb2 <- predict(
    xgb_model2,
    X_train2
  )

  acc_xgb2 <- as.data.frame(
    forecast::accuracy(
      pred_xgb2,
      actual2
    )
  )

  resid_xgb2 <- abs(
    y_train2 -
      train_pred_xgb2
  )

  qhat_xgb2 <- quantile(
    resid_xgb2,
    0.95,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )

  lower_xgb2 <- pmax(
    0,
    round(pred_xgb2 - qhat_xgb2)
  )

  upper_xgb2 <- round(
    pred_xgb2 + qhat_xgb2
  )

  coverage_xgb2 <- mean(
    actual2 >= lower_xgb2 &
      actual2 <= upper_xgb2
  )

  width_xgb2 <- mean(
    upper_xgb2 - lower_xgb2
  )

  results_xgb2 <- rbind(
    results_xgb2,
    data.frame(
      Replication = i,
      Coverage = coverage_xgb2,
      Width = width_xgb2,
      ME = acc_xgb2["Test set","ME"],
      RMSE = acc_xgb2["Test set","RMSE"],
      MAE = acc_xgb2["Test set","MAE"],
      MAPE = acc_xgb2["Test set","MAPE"]
    )
  )
}

summary_xgb2 <- data.frame(
  Mean_Coverage = mean(results_xgb2$Coverage),
  Mean_Width    = mean(results_xgb2$Width),
  Mean_ME       = mean(results_xgb2$ME),
  Mean_RMSE     = mean(results_xgb2$RMSE),
  Mean_MAE      = mean(results_xgb2$MAE),
  Mean_MAPE     = mean(results_xgb2$MAPE)
)

summary_xgb2
```




#90
```{r}

#========================================================
# LOAD PACKAGES
#========================================================

library(xgboost)
library(forecast)

#========================================================
# STORAGE OBJECT
#========================================================

results_xgb3 <- data.frame()

#========================================================
# REPRODUCIBILITY
#========================================================

set.seed(123)

R <- 100

#========================================================
# LOOP
#========================================================

for(i in 1:R){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("XGBOOST3 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  train_id3 <- sample(
    1:nrow(data1),
    size = floor(0.90*nrow(data1))
  )

  train_3 <- data1[train_id3, ]
  test_3  <- data1[-train_id3, ]

  train_3 <- na.omit(train_3)
  test_3  <- na.omit(test_3)

  X_train3 <- model.matrix(
    visits ~ hospital + chronic + health +
      adl + insurance + income + age - 1,
    data = train_3
  )

  X_test3 <- model.matrix(
    visits ~ hospital + chronic + health +
      adl + insurance + income + age - 1,
    data = test_3
  )

  y_train3 <- train_3$visits
  actual3  <- test_3$visits

  xgb_model3 <- xgboost(
    x = X_train3,
    y = y_train3,
    objective = "count:poisson",
    nrounds = 100,
    learning_rate = 0.1,
    max_depth = 6,
    verbose = 0
  )

  pred_xgb3 <- predict(
    xgb_model3,
    X_test3
  )

  pred_xgb3 <- round(pred_xgb3)

  train_pred_xgb3 <- predict(
    xgb_model3,
    X_train3
  )

  acc_xgb3 <- as.data.frame(
    forecast::accuracy(
      pred_xgb3,
      actual3
    )
  )

  resid_xgb3 <- abs(
    y_train3 -
      train_pred_xgb3
  )

  qhat_xgb3 <- quantile(
    resid_xgb3,
    0.95,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )

  lower_xgb3 <- pmax(
    0,
    round(pred_xgb3 - qhat_xgb3)
  )

  upper_xgb3 <- round(
    pred_xgb3 + qhat_xgb3
  )

  coverage_xgb3 <- mean(
    actual3 >= lower_xgb3 &
      actual3 <= upper_xgb3
  )

  width_xgb3 <- mean(
    upper_xgb3 - lower_xgb3
  )

  results_xgb3 <- rbind(
    results_xgb3,
    data.frame(
      Replication = i,
      Coverage = coverage_xgb3,
      Width = width_xgb3,
      ME = acc_xgb3["Test set","ME"],
      RMSE = acc_xgb3["Test set","RMSE"],
      MAE = acc_xgb3["Test set","MAE"],
      MAPE = acc_xgb3["Test set","MAPE"]
    )
  )
}

summary_xgb3 <- data.frame(
  Mean_Coverage = mean(results_xgb3$Coverage),
  Mean_Width    = mean(results_xgb3$Width),
  Mean_ME       = mean(results_xgb3$ME),
  Mean_RMSE     = mean(results_xgb3$RMSE),
  Mean_MAE      = mean(results_xgb3$MAE),
  Mean_MAPE     = mean(results_xgb3$MAPE)
)

summary_xgb3
```



##LIGHTLGM

```{r}

#========================================================
# LOAD PACKAGES
#========================================================

library(lightgbm)
library(forecast)

#========================================================
# LIGHTGBM FUNCTION
#========================================================

run_lgb <- function(split_prop,
                    data,
                    R = 100,
                    seed = 123){

  set.seed(seed)

  results_lgb <- data.frame()

  for(i in 1:R){

    cat("\n====================================\n")
    cat("Replication:", i, "\n")
    cat("====================================\n")

    #====================================================
    # TRAIN-TEST SPLIT
    #====================================================

    train_id <- sample(
      1:nrow(data),
      size = floor(split_prop * nrow(data))
    )

    train_data <- data[train_id, ]
    test_data  <- data[-train_id, ]

    train_data <- na.omit(train_data)
    test_data  <- na.omit(test_data)

    #====================================================
    # MODEL MATRICES
    #====================================================

    X_train <- model.matrix(
      visits ~
        hospital +
        chronic +
        health +
        adl +
        insurance +
        income +
        age - 1,
      data = train_data
    )

    X_test <- model.matrix(
      visits ~
        hospital +
        chronic +
        health +
        adl +
        insurance +
        income +
        age - 1,
      data = test_data
    )

    y_train <- train_data$visits
    y_test  <- test_data$visits

    #====================================================
    # LIGHTGBM DATASET
    #====================================================

    dtrain <- lgb.Dataset(
      X_train,
      label = y_train
    )

    #====================================================
    # POISSON MODEL
    #====================================================

    params_main <- list(
      objective = "poisson",
      learning_rate = 0.05,
      num_leaves = 31
    )

    lgb_model <- lgb.train(
      params = params_main,
      data = dtrain,
      nrounds = 100
    )

    #====================================================
    # POINT PREDICTIONS
    #====================================================

    pred_lgb <- predict(
      lgb_model,
      X_test
    )

    pred_lgb <- round(pred_lgb)

    #====================================================
    # LOWER QUANTILE MODEL
    #====================================================

    params_lower <- list(
      objective = "quantile",
      alpha = 0.025,
      metric = "quantile",
      learning_rate = 0.05,
      num_leaves = 31
    )

    lgb_lower <- lgb.train(
      params = params_lower,
      data = dtrain,
      nrounds = 150
    )

    #====================================================
    # UPPER QUANTILE MODEL
    #====================================================

    params_upper <- list(
      objective = "quantile",
      alpha = 0.975,
      metric = "quantile",
      learning_rate = 0.05,
      num_leaves = 31
    )

    lgb_upper <- lgb.train(
      params = params_upper,
      data = dtrain,
      nrounds = 150
    )

    #====================================================
    # INTERVALS
    #====================================================

    lower_lgb <- predict(
      lgb_lower,
      X_test
    )

    upper_lgb <- predict(
      lgb_upper,
      X_test
    )

    lower_lgb <- pmax(
      0,
      round(lower_lgb)
    )

    upper_lgb <- pmax(
      0,
      round(upper_lgb)
    )

    #====================================================
    # COVERAGE
    #====================================================

    coverage_lgb <- mean(
      y_test >= lower_lgb &
        y_test <= upper_lgb
    )

    #====================================================
    # WIDTH
    #====================================================

    width_lgb <- mean(
      upper_lgb - lower_lgb
    )

    #====================================================
    # ACCURACY
    #====================================================

    acc_lgb <- as.data.frame(
      forecast::accuracy(
        pred_lgb,
        y_test
      )
    )

    #====================================================
    # STORE RESULTS
    #====================================================

    results_lgb <- rbind(
      results_lgb,
      data.frame(
        Replication = i,
        Coverage = coverage_lgb,
        Width = width_lgb,
        ME = acc_lgb["Test set","ME"],
        RMSE = acc_lgb["Test set","RMSE"],
        MAE = acc_lgb["Test set","MAE"],
        MAPE = acc_lgb["Test set","MAPE"]
      )
    )
  }

  summary_lgb <- data.frame(

    Mean_Coverage =
      mean(results_lgb$Coverage,
           na.rm = TRUE),

    Mean_Width =
      mean(results_lgb$Width,
           na.rm = TRUE),

    Mean_ME =
      mean(results_lgb$ME,
           na.rm = TRUE),

    Mean_RMSE =
      mean(results_lgb$RMSE,
           na.rm = TRUE),

    Mean_MAE =
      mean(results_lgb$MAE,
           na.rm = TRUE),

    Mean_MAPE =
      mean(results_lgb$MAPE,
           na.rm = TRUE)
  )

  return(list(
    results = results_lgb,
    summary = summary_lgb
  ))
}

#========================================================
# 70:30 SPLIT
#========================================================

LGB70 <- run_lgb(
  split_prop = 0.70,
  data = data1
)

summary_lgb1 <- LGB70$summary


```


#80
```{r}
#========================================================
# LIGHTGBM POISSON MODEL
# QUANTILE PREDICTION INTERVAL
# 80:20 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

#========================================================
# LOAD PACKAGE
#========================================================

library(lightgbm)
library(forecast)

#========================================================
# STORAGE OBJECT
#========================================================

results_lgb2 <- data.frame()

#========================================================
# REPRODUCIBILITY
#========================================================

set.seed(123)

#========================================================
# NUMBER OF REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

R <- 100

#========================================================
# START LOOP
#========================================================

for(i in 1:R){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("LIGHTGBM2 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  #======================================================
  # TRAIN-TEST SPLIT
  #======================================================

  train_id2 <- sample(
    1:nrow(data1),
    size = floor(0.80 * nrow(data1))
  )

  train_2 <- data1[train_id2, ]
  test_2  <- data1[-train_id2, ]

  #======================================================
  # REMOVE MISSING VALUES
  #======================================================

  train_2 <- na.omit(train_2)
  test_2  <- na.omit(test_2)

  #======================================================
  # TRAIN MATRIX
  #======================================================

  X_train2 <- model.matrix(
    visits ~
      hospital +
      chronic +
      health +
      adl +
      insurance +
      income +
      age - 1,
    data = train_2
  )

  #======================================================
  # TEST MATRIX
  #======================================================

  X_test2 <- model.matrix(
    visits ~
      hospital +
      chronic +
      health +
      adl +
      insurance +
      income +
      age - 1,
    data = test_2
  )

  #======================================================
  # RESPONSE VARIABLES
  #======================================================

  y_train2 <- train_2$visits
  y_test2  <- test_2$visits

  #======================================================
  # LIGHTGBM DATASET
  #======================================================

  dtrain2 <- lgb.Dataset(
    X_train2,
    label = y_train2
  )

  #======================================================
  # POISSON MODEL
  #======================================================

  params_main <- list(
    objective = "poisson",
    learning_rate = 0.05,
    num_leaves = 31
  )

  lgb_model2 <- lgb.train(
    params = params_main,
    data = dtrain2,
    nrounds = 100
  )

  #======================================================
  # POINT PREDICTIONS
  #======================================================

  pred_lgb2 <- predict(
    lgb_model2,
    X_test2
  )

  pred_lgb2 <- round(pred_lgb2)

  #======================================================
  # LOWER QUANTILE MODEL
  #======================================================

  params_lower <- list(
    objective = "quantile",
    alpha = 0.025,
    metric = "quantile",
    learning_rate = 0.05,
    num_leaves = 31
  )

  lgb_lower2 <- lgb.train(
    params = params_lower,
    data = dtrain2,
    nrounds = 150
  )

  #======================================================
  # UPPER QUANTILE MODEL
  #======================================================

  params_upper <- list(
    objective = "quantile",
    alpha = 0.975,
    metric = "quantile",
    learning_rate = 0.05,
    num_leaves = 31
  )

  lgb_upper2 <- lgb.train(
    params = params_upper,
    data = dtrain2,
    nrounds = 150
  )

  #======================================================
  # QUANTILE PREDICTIONS
  #======================================================

  lower_lgb2 <- predict(
    lgb_lower2,
    X_test2
  )

  upper_lgb2 <- predict(
    lgb_upper2,
    X_test2
  )

  #======================================================
  # NONNEGATIVE COUNTS
  #======================================================

  lower_lgb2 <- pmax(
    0,
    round(lower_lgb2)
  )

  upper_lgb2 <- pmax(
    0,
    round(upper_lgb2)
  )

  #======================================================
  # COVERAGE
  #======================================================

  coverage_lgb2 <- mean(
    y_test2 >= lower_lgb2 &
    y_test2 <= upper_lgb2
  )

  #======================================================
  # WIDTH
  #======================================================

  width_lgb2 <- mean(
    upper_lgb2 - lower_lgb2
  )

  #======================================================
  # ACCURACY
  #======================================================

  acc_lgb2 <- as.data.frame(
    forecast::accuracy(
      pred_lgb2,
      y_test2
    )
  )

  #======================================================
  # STORE RESULTS
  #======================================================

  results_lgb2 <- rbind(
    results_lgb2,
    data.frame(
      Replication = i,
      Coverage = coverage_lgb2,
      Width = width_lgb2,
      ME = acc_lgb2["Test set","ME"],
      RMSE = acc_lgb2["Test set","RMSE"],
      MAE = acc_lgb2["Test set","MAE"],
      MAPE = acc_lgb2["Test set","MAPE"]
    )
  )

  #======================================================
  # PRINT RESULTS
  #======================================================

  cat("RMSE :", round(acc_lgb2["Test set","RMSE"],4), "\n")
  cat("MAE :", round(acc_lgb2["Test set","MAE"],4), "\n")
  cat("Coverage :", round(coverage_lgb2,4), "\n")
  cat("Width :", round(width_lgb2,4), "\n")
}

#========================================================
# FINAL SUMMARY
#========================================================

summary_lgb2 <- data.frame(

  Mean_Coverage = mean(results_lgb2$Coverage),

  Mean_Width = mean(results_lgb2$Width),

  Mean_ME = mean(results_lgb2$ME),

  Mean_RMSE = mean(results_lgb2$RMSE),

  Mean_MAE = mean(results_lgb2$MAE),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(results_lgb2$MAPE)

)

summary_lgb2
```

#90
```{r}
#========================================================
# LIGHTGBM POISSON MODEL
# QUANTILE PREDICTION INTERVAL
# 90:10 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

#========================================================
# LOAD PACKAGE
#========================================================

library(lightgbm)
library(forecast)

#========================================================
# STORAGE OBJECT
#========================================================

results_lgb3 <- data.frame()

#========================================================
# REPRODUCIBILITY
#========================================================

set.seed(123)

#========================================================
# NUMBER OF REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

R <- 100

#========================================================
# START LOOP
#========================================================

for(i in 1:R){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("LIGHTGBM3 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  #======================================================
  # TRAIN-TEST SPLIT
  #======================================================

  train_id3 <- sample(
    1:nrow(data1),
    size = floor(0.90 * nrow(data1))
  )

  train_3 <- data1[train_id3, ]
  test_3  <- data1[-train_id3, ]

  #======================================================
  # REMOVE MISSING VALUES
  #======================================================

  train_3 <- na.omit(train_3)
  test_3  <- na.omit(test_3)

  #======================================================
  # TRAIN MATRIX
  #======================================================

  X_train3 <- model.matrix(
    visits ~
      hospital +
      chronic +
      health +
      adl +
      insurance +
      income +
      age - 1,
    data = train_3
  )

  #======================================================
  # TEST MATRIX
  #======================================================

  X_test3 <- model.matrix(
    visits ~
      hospital +
      chronic +
      health +
      adl +
      insurance +
      income +
      age - 1,
    data = test_3
  )

  #======================================================
  # RESPONSE VARIABLES
  #======================================================

  y_train3 <- train_3$visits
  y_test3  <- test_3$visits

  #======================================================
  # LIGHTGBM DATASET
  #======================================================

  dtrain3 <- lgb.Dataset(
    X_train3,
    label = y_train3
  )

  #======================================================
  # POISSON MODEL
  #======================================================

  params_main <- list(
    objective = "poisson",
    learning_rate = 0.05,
    num_leaves = 31
  )

  lgb_model3 <- lgb.train(
    params = params_main,
    data = dtrain3,
    nrounds = 100
  )

  #======================================================
  # POINT PREDICTIONS
  #======================================================

  pred_lgb3 <- predict(
    lgb_model3,
    X_test3
  )

  pred_lgb3 <- round(pred_lgb3)

  #======================================================
  # LOWER QUANTILE MODEL
  #======================================================

  params_lower <- list(
    objective = "quantile",
    alpha = 0.025,
    metric = "quantile",
    learning_rate = 0.05,
    num_leaves = 31
  )

  lgb_lower3 <- lgb.train(
    params = params_lower,
    data = dtrain3,
    nrounds = 150
  )

  #======================================================
  # UPPER QUANTILE MODEL
  #======================================================

  params_upper <- list(
    objective = "quantile",
    alpha = 0.975,
    metric = "quantile",
    learning_rate = 0.05,
    num_leaves = 31
  )

  lgb_upper3 <- lgb.train(
    params = params_upper,
    data = dtrain3,
    nrounds = 150
  )

  #======================================================
  # QUANTILE PREDICTIONS
  #======================================================

  lower_lgb3 <- predict(
    lgb_lower3,
    X_test3
  )

  upper_lgb3 <- predict(
    lgb_upper3,
    X_test3
  )

  #======================================================
  # NONNEGATIVE COUNTS
  #======================================================

  lower_lgb3 <- pmax(
    0,
    round(lower_lgb3)
  )

  upper_lgb3 <- pmax(
    0,
    round(upper_lgb3)
  )

  #======================================================
  # COVERAGE
  #======================================================

  coverage_lgb3 <- mean(
    y_test3 >= lower_lgb3 &
    y_test3 <= upper_lgb3
  )

  #======================================================
  # WIDTH
  #======================================================

  width_lgb3 <- mean(
    upper_lgb3 - lower_lgb3
  )

  #======================================================
  # ACCURACY
  #======================================================

  acc_lgb3 <- as.data.frame(
    forecast::accuracy(
      pred_lgb3,
      y_test3
    )
  )

  #======================================================
  # STORE RESULTS
  #======================================================

  results_lgb3 <- rbind(
    results_lgb3,
    data.frame(
      Replication = i,
      Coverage = coverage_lgb3,
      Width = width_lgb3,
      ME = acc_lgb3["Test set","ME"],
      RMSE = acc_lgb3["Test set","RMSE"],
      MAE = acc_lgb3["Test set","MAE"],
      MAPE = acc_lgb3["Test set","MAPE"]
    )
  )

  #======================================================
  # PRINT RESULTS
  #======================================================

  cat("RMSE :", round(acc_lgb3["Test set","RMSE"],4), "\n")
  cat("MAE :", round(acc_lgb3["Test set","MAE"],4), "\n")
  cat("Coverage :", round(coverage_lgb3,4), "\n")
  cat("Width :", round(width_lgb3,4), "\n")
}

#========================================================
# FINAL SUMMARY
#========================================================

summary_lgb3 <- data.frame(

  Mean_Coverage =
    mean(results_lgb3$Coverage,
         na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_Width =
    mean(results_lgb3$Width,
         na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_ME =
    mean(results_lgb3$ME,
         na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_RMSE =
    mean(results_lgb3$RMSE,
         na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_MAE =
    mean(results_lgb3$MAE,
         na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_MAPE =
    mean(results_lgb3$MAPE,
         na.rm = TRUE)
)

summary_lgb3
 
```


#GLMNET
```{r}
#========================================================
# GLMNET POISSON MODEL
# CONFORMAL PI
# 70:30 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

#========================================================
# LOAD PACKAGE
#========================================================

library(glmnet)

#========================================================
# STORAGE OBJECT
#========================================================

results_glmnet1 <- data.frame()

#========================================================
# REPRODUCIBILITY
#========================================================

set.seed(123)

#========================================================
# NUMBER OF REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

R <- 100

#========================================================
# START LOOP
#========================================================

for(i in 1:R){

  cat("\n====================================\n")

  cat("GLMNET1 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")

  cat("====================================\n")

  #======================================================
  # CREATE TRAIN-TEST SPLIT
  #======================================================

  train_id1 <- sample(

    1:nrow(data1),

    size = floor(
      0.70 * nrow(data1)
    )
  )

  train_1 <- data1[train_id1, ]

  test_1 <- data1[-train_id1, ]

  #======================================================
  # REMOVE MISSING VALUES
  #======================================================

  train_1_clean <- train_1[
    complete.cases(train_1),
  ]

  test_1 <- test_1[
    complete.cases(test_1),
  ]

  #======================================================
  # TRAIN MATRIX
  #======================================================

  X_train1 <- model.matrix(

    visits ~

      hospital +

      chronic +

      health +

      adl +

      insurance +

      income +

      age - 1,

    data = train_1_clean
  )

  #======================================================
  # TEST MATRIX
  #======================================================

  X_test1 <- model.matrix(

    visits ~

      hospital +

      chronic +

      health +

      adl +

      insurance +

      income +

      age - 1,

    data = test_1
  )

  #======================================================
  # MATCH TEST COLUMNS
  #======================================================

  missing_cols <- setdiff(

    colnames(X_train1),

    colnames(X_test1)
  )

  for(col in missing_cols){

    X_test1 <- cbind(

      X_test1,

      rep(
        0,
        nrow(X_test1)
      )
    )

    colnames(
      X_test1
    )[ncol(X_test1)] <- col
  }

  X_test1 <- X_test1[
    ,
    colnames(X_train1)
  ]

  #======================================================
  # SCALE DATA
  #======================================================

  X_train1 <- scale(
    X_train1
  )

  X_test1 <- scale(

    X_test1,

    center = attr(
      X_train1,
      "scaled:center"
    ),

    scale = attr(
      X_train1,
      "scaled:scale"
    )
  )

  #======================================================
  # RESPONSE VARIABLES
  #======================================================

  y_train1 <- train_1_clean$visits

  actual1 <- test_1$visits

  #======================================================
  # FIT GLMNET MODEL
  #======================================================

  model_glmnet1 <- cv.glmnet(

    x = X_train1,

    y = y_train1,

    family = "poisson",

    alpha = 1
  )

  #======================================================
  # TEST PREDICTIONS
  #======================================================

  pred_glmnet1 <- predict(

    model_glmnet1,

    newx = X_test1,

    s = "lambda.min",

    type = "response"
  )

  pred_glmnet1 <- as.numeric(
    pred_glmnet1
  )

  pred_glmnet1 <- round(
    pred_glmnet1
  )

  #======================================================
  # CONFORMAL PI
  #======================================================

  resid_glmnet1 <- abs(

    actual1 -

      pred_glmnet1
  )

  resid_glmnet1 <- resid_glmnet1[
    is.finite(resid_glmnet1)
  ]

  qhat_glmnet1 <- quantile(

    resid_glmnet1,

    0.95,

    na.rm = TRUE
  )

  lower_glmnet1 <- pred_glmnet1 -

    qhat_glmnet1

  upper_glmnet1 <- pred_glmnet1 +

    qhat_glmnet1

  #======================================================
  # NONNEGATIVE COUNTS
  #======================================================

  lower_glmnet1 <- pmax(

    0,

    round(lower_glmnet1)
  )

  upper_glmnet1 <- round(
    upper_glmnet1
  )

  #======================================================
  # COVERAGE
  #======================================================

  coverage_glmnet1 <- mean(

    actual1 >= lower_glmnet1 &

      actual1 <= upper_glmnet1
  )

  #======================================================
  # WIDTH
  #======================================================

  width_glmnet1 <- mean(

    upper_glmnet1 -

      lower_glmnet1
  )

  #======================================================
  # RMSE
  #======================================================
acc_glm1 <- as.data.frame(
  forecast::accuracy(
    pred_glmnet1,
    actual1
  )
)

#======================================================
# STORE RESULTS
#======================================================

results_glmnet1 <- rbind(

  results_glmnet1,

  data.frame(

    Replication = i,

    Coverage = coverage_glmnet1,

    Width = width_glmnet1,

    ME = acc_glm1["Test set","ME"],

    RMSE = acc_glm1["Test set","RMSE"],

    MAE = acc_glm1["Test set","MAE"],

    MAPE = acc_glm1["Test set","MAPE"]

  )
)

#======================================================
# PRINT RESULTS
#======================================================

cat("RMSE :", round(acc_glm1["Test set","RMSE"],4), "\n")
cat("MAE :", round(acc_glm1["Test set","MAE"],4), "\n")
cat("Coverage :", round(coverage_glmnet1,4), "\n")
cat("Width :", round(width_glmnet1,4), "\n")
}

#========================================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#========================================================

summary_glmnet1 <- data.frame(

  Mean_Coverage =
    mean(
      results_glmnet1$Coverage,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),

  Mean_Width =
    mean(
      results_glmnet1$Width,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),

  Mean_ME =
    mean(
      results_glmnet1$ME,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),

  Mean_RMSE =
    mean(
      results_glmnet1$RMSE,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),

  Mean_MAE =
    mean(
      results_glmnet1$MAE,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),

  Mean_MAPE =
    mean(
      results_glmnet1$MAPE,
      na.rm = TRUE
    )
)

summary_glmnet1
```

#80
```{r}
#========================================================
# GLMNET POISSON MODEL
# CONFORMAL PI
# 80:20 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
# FULL CORRECTED CODE
#========================================================
#========================================================
# STORAGE OBJECT
#========================================================

results_glmnet2 <- data.frame()

#========================================================
# REPRODUCIBILITY
#========================================================

set.seed(123)

#========================================================
# NUMBER OF REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

R <- 100

#========================================================
# START LOOP
#========================================================

for(i in 1:R){

  cat("\n====================================\n")

  cat("GLMNET2 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")

  cat("====================================\n")

  #======================================================
  # CREATE TRAIN-TEST SPLIT
  #======================================================

  train_id2 <- sample(

    1:nrow(data1),

    size = floor(
      0.80 * nrow(data1)
    )
  )

  train_2 <- data1[train_id2, ]

  test_2 <- data1[-train_id2, ]

  #======================================================
  # REMOVE MISSING VALUES
  #======================================================

  train_2_clean <- train_2[
    complete.cases(train_2),
  ]

  test_2 <- test_2[
    complete.cases(test_2),
  ]

  #======================================================
  # TRAIN MATRIX
  #======================================================

  X_train2 <- model.matrix(

    visits ~

      hospital +

      chronic +

      health +

      adl +

      insurance +

      income +

      age - 1,

    data = train_2_clean
  )

  #======================================================
  # TEST MATRIX
  #======================================================

  X_test2 <- model.matrix(

    visits ~

      hospital +

      chronic +

      health +

      adl +

      insurance +

      income +

      age - 1,

    data = test_2
  )

  #======================================================
  # MATCH TEST COLUMNS
  #======================================================

  missing_cols <- setdiff(

    colnames(X_train2),

    colnames(X_test2)
  )

  #======================================================
  # ADD MISSING COLUMNS
  #======================================================

  for(col in missing_cols){

    X_test2 <- cbind(

      X_test2,

      rep(
        0,
        nrow(X_test2)
      )
    )

    colnames(
      X_test2
    )[ncol(X_test2)] <- col
  }

  #======================================================
  # REORDER TEST MATRIX
  #======================================================

  X_test2 <- X_test2[
    ,
    colnames(X_train2)
  ]

  #======================================================
  # SCALE DATA
  #======================================================

  X_train2 <- scale(
    X_train2
  )

  X_test2 <- scale(

    X_test2,

    center = attr(
      X_train2,
      "scaled:center"
    ),

    scale = attr(
      X_train2,
      "scaled:scale"
    )
  )

  #======================================================
  # RESPONSE VARIABLES
  #======================================================

  y_train2 <- train_2_clean$visits

  actual2 <- test_2$visits

  #======================================================
  # FIT GLMNET MODEL
  #======================================================

  model_glmnet2 <- cv.glmnet(

    x = X_train2,

    y = y_train2,

    family = "poisson",

    alpha = 1
  )

  #======================================================
  # TEST PREDICTIONS
  #======================================================

  pred_glmnet2 <- predict(

    model_glmnet2,

    newx = X_test2,

    s = "lambda.min",

    type = "response"
  )

  pred_glmnet2 <- as.numeric(
    pred_glmnet2
  )

  pred_glmnet2 <- round(
    pred_glmnet2
  )

  #======================================================
  # CONFORMAL RESIDUALS
  #======================================================

  resid_glmnet2 <- abs(

    actual2 -

      pred_glmnet2
  )

  resid_glmnet2 <- resid_glmnet2[
    is.finite(resid_glmnet2)
  ]

  #======================================================
  # 95% CONFORMAL QUANTILE
  #======================================================

  qhat_glmnet2 <- quantile(

    resid_glmnet2,

    0.95,

    na.rm = TRUE
  )

  #======================================================
  # PREDICTION INTERVALS
  #======================================================

  lower_glmnet2 <- pred_glmnet2 -

    qhat_glmnet2

  upper_glmnet2 <- pred_glmnet2 +

    qhat_glmnet2

  #======================================================
  # NONNEGATIVE COUNTS
  #======================================================

  lower_glmnet2 <- pmax(

    0,

    round(lower_glmnet2)
  )

  upper_glmnet2 <- round(
    upper_glmnet2
  )

  #======================================================
  # COVERAGE
  #======================================================

  coverage_glmnet2 <- mean(

    actual2 >= lower_glmnet2 &

      actual2 <= upper_glmnet2
  )

  #======================================================
  # WIDTH
  #======================================================

  width_glmnet2 <- mean(

    upper_glmnet2 -

      lower_glmnet2
  )

  #======================================================
  # RMSE
  #======================================================


acc_glm2
 acc_glm1 <- as.data.frame(
  forecast::accuracy(
    pred_glmnet1,
    actual1
  )
)

#======================================================
# STORE RESULTS
#======================================================

results_glmnet2 <- rbind(

  results_glmnet2,

  data.frame(

    Replication = i,

    Coverage = coverage_glmnet2,

    Width = width_glmnet2,

    ME = acc_glm2["Test set","ME"],

    RMSE = acc_glm2["Test set","RMSE"],

    MAE = acc_glm2["Test set","MAE"],

    MAPE = acc_glm2["Test set","MAPE"]

  )
)


  #======================================================
  # PRINT RESULTS
  #======================================================
cat(
    "RMSE :",
    round(acc_glm2["Test set","RMSE"],4),
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "MAE :",
    round(acc_glm2["Test set","MAE"],4),
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "Coverage :",
    round(coverage_glmnet3,4),
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "Width :",
    round(width_glmnet2,4),
    "\n"
  )
  
}
#========================================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#========================================================

summary_glmnet2 <- data.frame(

  Mean_Coverage =
    mean(
      results_glmnet2$Coverage,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),

  Mean_Width =
    mean(
      results_glmnet2$Width,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),

  Mean_ME =
    mean(
      results_glmnet2$ME,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),

  Mean_RMSE =
    mean(
      results_glmnet2$RMSE,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),

  Mean_MAE =
    mean(
      results_glmnet2$MAE,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),

  Mean_MAPE =
    mean(
      results_glmnet2$MAPE,
      na.rm = TRUE
    )
)

summary_glmnet2

```

#90
```{r}
#========================================================
# GLMNET POISSON MODEL
# CONFORMAL PI
# 90:10 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
# FULL CORRECTED CODE
#========================================================

#========================================================
# GLMNET POISSON MODEL
# CONFORMAL PI
# 90:10 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

#========================================================
# LOAD PACKAGE
#========================================================

library(glmnet)
library(forecast)

#========================================================
# STORAGE OBJECT
#========================================================

results_glmnet3 <- data.frame()

#========================================================
# REPRODUCIBILITY
#========================================================

set.seed(123)

#========================================================
# NUMBER OF REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

R <- 100

#========================================================
# START LOOP
#========================================================

for(i in 1:R){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("GLMNET3 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  #======================================================
  # CREATE TRAIN-TEST SPLIT
  #======================================================

  train_id3 <- sample(
    1:nrow(data1),
    size = floor(0.90 * nrow(data1))
  )

  train_3 <- data1[train_id3, ]

  test_3 <- data1[-train_id3, ]

  #======================================================
  # REMOVE MISSING VALUES
  #======================================================

  train_3_clean <- train_3[
    complete.cases(train_3),
  ]

  test_3 <- test_3[
    complete.cases(test_3),
  ]

  #======================================================
  # TRAIN MATRIX
  #======================================================

  X_train3 <- model.matrix(

    visits ~

      hospital +

      chronic +

      health +

      adl +

      insurance +

      income +

      age - 1,

    data = train_3_clean
  )

  #======================================================
  # TEST MATRIX
  #======================================================

  X_test3 <- model.matrix(

    visits ~

      hospital +

      chronic +

      health +

      adl +

      insurance +

      income +

      age - 1,

    data = test_3
  )

  #======================================================
  # MATCH TEST COLUMNS
  #======================================================

  missing_cols <- setdiff(

    colnames(X_train3),

    colnames(X_test3)
  )

  for(col in missing_cols){

    X_test3 <- cbind(

      X_test3,

      rep(
        0,
        nrow(X_test3)
      )
    )

    colnames(
      X_test3
    )[ncol(X_test3)] <- col
  }

  X_test3 <- X_test3[
    ,
    colnames(X_train3)
  ]

  #======================================================
  # SCALE DATA
  #======================================================

  X_train3 <- scale(
    X_train3
  )

  X_test3 <- scale(

    X_test3,

    center = attr(
      X_train3,
      "scaled:center"
    ),

    scale = attr(
      X_train3,
      "scaled:scale"
    )
  )

  #======================================================
  # RESPONSE VARIABLES
  #======================================================

  y_train3 <- train_3_clean$visits

  actual3 <- test_3$visits

  #======================================================
  # FIT GLMNET MODEL
  #======================================================

  model_glmnet3 <- cv.glmnet(

    x = X_train3,

    y = y_train3,

    family = "poisson",

    alpha = 1
  )

  #======================================================
  # TEST PREDICTIONS
  #======================================================

  pred_glmnet3 <- predict(

    model_glmnet3,

    newx = X_test3,

    s = "lambda.min",

    type = "response"
  )

  pred_glmnet3 <- as.numeric(
    pred_glmnet3
  )

  pred_glmnet3 <- round(
    pred_glmnet3
  )

  #======================================================
  # CONFORMAL PI
  #======================================================

  resid_glmnet3 <- abs(

    actual3 -

      pred_glmnet3
  )

  resid_glmnet3 <- resid_glmnet3[
    is.finite(resid_glmnet3)
  ]

  qhat_glmnet3 <- quantile(

    resid_glmnet3,

    0.95,

    na.rm = TRUE
  )

  lower_glmnet3 <- pred_glmnet3 -

    qhat_glmnet3

  upper_glmnet3 <- pred_glmnet3 +

    qhat_glmnet3

  #======================================================
  # NONNEGATIVE COUNTS
  #======================================================

  lower_glmnet3 <- pmax(

    0,

    round(lower_glmnet3)
  )

  upper_glmnet3 <- round(
    upper_glmnet3
  )

  #======================================================
  # COVERAGE
  #======================================================

  coverage_glmnet3 <- mean(

    actual3 >= lower_glmnet3 &

      actual3 <= upper_glmnet3
  )

  #======================================================
  # WIDTH
  #======================================================

  width_glmnet3 <- mean(

    upper_glmnet3 -

      lower_glmnet3
  )

  #======================================================
  # ACCURACY MEASURES
  #======================================================

  acc_glm3 <- as.data.frame(
    forecast::accuracy(
      pred_glmnet3,
      actual3
    )
  )

  #======================================================
  # STORE RESULTS
  #======================================================

  results_glmnet3 <- rbind(

    results_glmnet3,

    data.frame(

      Replication = i,

      Coverage = coverage_glmnet3,

      Width = width_glmnet3,

      ME = acc_glm3["Test set","ME"],

      RMSE = acc_glm3["Test set","RMSE"],

      MAE = acc_glm3["Test set","MAE"],

      MAPE = acc_glm3["Test set","MAPE"]
    )
  )

  #======================================================
  # PRINT RESULTS
  #======================================================

  cat(
    "RMSE :",
    round(acc_glm3["Test set","RMSE"],4),
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "MAE :",
    round(acc_glm3["Test set","MAE"],4),
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "Coverage :",
    round(coverage_glmnet3,4),
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "Width :",
    round(width_glmnet3,4),
    "\n"
  )
}

#========================================================
# FINAL SUMMARY
#========================================================

summary_glmnet3 <- data.frame(

  Mean_Coverage =
    mean(results_glmnet3$Coverage,
         na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_Width =
    mean(results_glmnet3$Width,
         na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_ME =
    mean(results_glmnet3$ME,
         na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_RMSE =
    mean(results_glmnet3$RMSE,
         na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_MAE =
    mean(results_glmnet3$MAE,
         na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_MAPE =
    mean(results_glmnet3$MAPE,
         na.rm = TRUE)
)

summary_glmnet3

```



##NEURAL-NETWORK
```{r}
#========================================================
# NEURAL NETWORK (NNET)
# CONFORMAL PREDICTION INTERVAL
# 70:30 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

#========================================================
# LOAD PACKAGES
#========================================================

library(nnet)
library(forecast)

#========================================================
# STORAGE OBJECT
#========================================================

results_nn1 <- data.frame()

#========================================================
# REPRODUCIBILITY
#========================================================

set.seed(123)

#========================================================
# NUMBER OF REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

R <- 100

#========================================================
# START LOOP
#========================================================

for(i in 1:R){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("NNET1 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  #======================================================
  # TRAIN TEST SPLIT
  #======================================================

  train_id1 <- sample(
    1:nrow(data1),
    size = floor(0.70 * nrow(data1))
  )

  train_1 <- data1[train_id1, ]
  test_1  <- data1[-train_id1, ]

  #======================================================
  # REMOVE MISSING VALUES
  #======================================================

  train_1 <- na.omit(train_1)
  test_1  <- na.omit(test_1)

  #======================================================
  # FIX FACTOR LEVELS
  #======================================================

  factor_vars <- c(
    "health",
    "insurance",
    "hospital",
    "chronic"
  )

  for(v in factor_vars){

    train_1[[v]] <- factor(
      train_1[[v]],
      levels = levels(
        factor(data1[[v]])
      )
    )

    test_1[[v]] <- factor(
      test_1[[v]],
      levels = levels(
        factor(data1[[v]])
      )
    )
  }

  #======================================================
  # FIT MODEL
  #======================================================

  nn_model1 <- nnet(

    visits ~

      hospital +

      chronic +

      health +

      adl +

      insurance +

      income +

      age,

    data = train_1,

    size = 5,

    linout = TRUE,

    trace = FALSE,

    maxit = 500
  )

  #======================================================
  # TEST PREDICTIONS
  #======================================================

  pred_nn1 <- predict(
    nn_model1,
    newdata = test_1
  )

  pred_nn1 <- as.numeric(
    pred_nn1
  )

  pred_nn1 <- round(
    pred_nn1
  )

  pred_nn1 <- pmax(
    0,
    pred_nn1
  )

  #======================================================
  # ACTUAL VALUES
  #======================================================

  actual1 <- test_1$visits

  #======================================================
  # CONFORMAL RESIDUALS
  #======================================================

  resid_nn1 <- abs(
    actual1 -
      pred_nn1
  )

  resid_nn1 <- resid_nn1[
    is.finite(resid_nn1)
  ]

  #======================================================
  # CONFORMAL QUANTILE
  #======================================================

  qhat_nn1 <- quantile(
    resid_nn1,
    probs = 0.95,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )

  #======================================================
  # PREDICTION INTERVALS
  #======================================================

  lower_nn1 <- pred_nn1 -
    qhat_nn1

  upper_nn1 <- pred_nn1 +
    qhat_nn1

  #======================================================
  # NONNEGATIVE COUNTS
  #======================================================

  lower_nn1 <- pmax(
    0,
    round(lower_nn1)
  )

  upper_nn1 <- round(
    upper_nn1
  )

  #======================================================
  # COVERAGE
  #======================================================

  coverage_nn1 <- mean(
    actual1 >= lower_nn1 &
      actual1 <= upper_nn1
  )

  #======================================================
  # WIDTH
  #======================================================

  width_nn1 <- mean(
    upper_nn1 -
      lower_nn1
  )

  #======================================================
  # ACCURACY MEASURES
  #======================================================

  acc_nn1 <- as.data.frame(
    forecast::accuracy(
      pred_nn1,
      actual1
    )
  )

  #======================================================
  # STORE RESULTS
  #======================================================

  results_nn1 <- rbind(
    results_nn1,
    data.frame(
      Replication = i,
      Coverage = coverage_nn1,
      Width = width_nn1,
      ME = acc_nn1["Test set","ME"],
      RMSE = acc_nn1["Test set","RMSE"],
      MAE = acc_nn1["Test set","MAE"],
      MAPE = acc_nn1["Test set","MAPE"]
    )
  )

  #======================================================
  # PRINT RESULTS
  #======================================================

  cat(
    "RMSE :",
    round(
      acc_nn1["Test set","RMSE"],
      4
    ),
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "MAE :",
    round(
      acc_nn1["Test set","MAE"],
      4
    ),
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "Coverage :",
    round(
      coverage_nn1,
      4
    ),
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "Width :",
    round(
      width_nn1,
      4
    ),
    "\n"
  )

}

#========================================================
# FINAL SUMMARY
#========================================================

summary_nn1 <- data.frame(

  Mean_Coverage =
    mean(
      results_nn1$Coverage,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),

  Mean_Width =
    mean(
      results_nn1$Width,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),

  Mean_ME =
    mean(
      results_nn1$ME,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),

  Mean_RMSE =
    mean(
      results_nn1$RMSE,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),

  Mean_MAE =
    mean(
      results_nn1$MAE,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),

  Mean_MAPE =
    mean(
      results_nn1$MAPE,
      na.rm = TRUE
    )
)

summary_nn1


```


#80
```{r}
#========================================================
# NEURAL NETWORK (NNET)
# CONFORMAL PREDICTION INTERVAL
# 80:20 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

library(nnet)
library(forecast)

results_nn2 <- data.frame()

set.seed(123)

R <- 100

for(i in 1:R){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("NNET2 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  train_id2 <- sample(
    1:nrow(data1),
    size = floor(0.80 * nrow(data1))
  )

  train_2 <- data1[train_id2, ]
  test_2  <- data1[-train_id2, ]

  train_2 <- na.omit(train_2)
  test_2  <- na.omit(test_2)

  factor_vars <- c(
    "health",
    "insurance",
    "hospital",
    "chronic"
  )

  for(v in factor_vars){

    train_2[[v]] <- factor(
      train_2[[v]],
      levels = levels(factor(data1[[v]]))
    )

    test_2[[v]] <- factor(
      test_2[[v]],
      levels = levels(factor(data1[[v]]))
    )
  }

  nn_model2 <- nnet(

    visits ~

      hospital +

      chronic +

      health +

      adl +

      insurance +

      income +

      age,

    data = train_2,

    size = 5,

    linout = TRUE,

    trace = FALSE,

    maxit = 500
  )

  pred_nn2 <- predict(
    nn_model2,
    newdata = test_2
  )

  pred_nn2 <- as.numeric(pred_nn2)

  pred_nn2 <- round(pred_nn2)

  pred_nn2 <- pmax(0, pred_nn2)

  actual2 <- test_2$visits

  resid_nn2 <- abs(
    actual2 - pred_nn2
  )

  resid_nn2 <- resid_nn2[
    is.finite(resid_nn2)
  ]

  qhat_nn2 <- quantile(
    resid_nn2,
    0.95,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )

  lower_nn2 <- pred_nn2 - qhat_nn2

  upper_nn2 <- pred_nn2 + qhat_nn2

  lower_nn2 <- pmax(
    0,
    round(lower_nn2)
  )

  upper_nn2 <- round(
    upper_nn2
  )

  coverage_nn2 <- mean(
    actual2 >= lower_nn2 &
      actual2 <= upper_nn2
  )

  width_nn2 <- mean(
    upper_nn2 -
      lower_nn2
  )

  acc_nn2 <- as.data.frame(
    forecast::accuracy(
      pred_nn2,
      actual2
    )
  )

  results_nn2 <- rbind(
    results_nn2,
    data.frame(
      Replication = i,
      Coverage = coverage_nn2,
      Width = width_nn2,
      ME = acc_nn2["Test set","ME"],
      RMSE = acc_nn2["Test set","RMSE"],
      MAE = acc_nn2["Test set","MAE"],
      MAPE = acc_nn2["Test set","MAPE"]
    )
  )

  cat(
    "RMSE :",
    round(acc_nn2["Test set","RMSE"],4),
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "MAE :",
    round(acc_nn2["Test set","MAE"],4),
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "Coverage :",
    round(coverage_nn2,4),
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "Width :",
    round(width_nn2,4),
    "\n"
  )
}

summary_nn2 <- data.frame(

  Mean_Coverage =
    mean(results_nn2$Coverage, na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_Width =
    mean(results_nn2$Width, na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_ME =
    mean(results_nn2$ME, na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_RMSE =
    mean(results_nn2$RMSE, na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_MAE =
    mean(results_nn2$MAE, na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_MAPE =
    mean(results_nn2$MAPE, na.rm = TRUE)
)

summary_nn2


```


#90
```{r}
#========================================================
# NEURAL NETWORK (NNET)
# CONFORMAL PREDICTION INTERVAL
# 90:10 SPLIT
# 100 REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

#========================================================
# LOAD PACKAGES
#========================================================

library(nnet)
library(forecast)

#========================================================
# STORAGE OBJECT
#========================================================

results_nn3 <- data.frame()

#========================================================
# REPRODUCIBILITY
#========================================================

set.seed(123)

#========================================================
# NUMBER OF REPLICATIONS
#========================================================

R <- 100

#========================================================
# START LOOP
#========================================================

for(i in 1:R){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("NNET3 : REPLICATION", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  #======================================================
  # TRAIN TEST SPLIT
  #======================================================

  train_id3 <- sample(
    1:nrow(data1),
    size = floor(0.90 * nrow(data1))
  )

  train_3 <- data1[train_id3, ]
  test_3  <- data1[-train_id3, ]

  #======================================================
  # REMOVE MISSING VALUES
  #======================================================

  train_3 <- na.omit(train_3)
  test_3  <- na.omit(test_3)

  #======================================================
  # FIX FACTOR LEVELS
  #======================================================

  factor_vars <- c(
    "health",
    "insurance",
    "hospital",
    "chronic"
  )

  for(v in factor_vars){

    train_3[[v]] <- factor(
      train_3[[v]],
      levels = levels(
        factor(data1[[v]])
      )
    )

    test_3[[v]] <- factor(
      test_3[[v]],
      levels = levels(
        factor(data1[[v]])
      )
    )
  }

  #======================================================
  # FIT MODEL
  #======================================================

  nn_model3 <- nnet(

    visits ~

      hospital +

      chronic +

      health +

      adl +

      insurance +

      income +

      age,

    data = train_3,

    size = 5,

    linout = TRUE,

    trace = FALSE,

    maxit = 500
  )

  #======================================================
  # TEST PREDICTIONS
  #======================================================

  pred_nn3 <- predict(
    nn_model3,
    newdata = test_3
  )

  pred_nn3 <- as.numeric(
    pred_nn3
  )

  pred_nn3 <- round(
    pred_nn3
  )

  pred_nn3 <- pmax(
    0,
    pred_nn3
  )

  #======================================================
  # ACTUAL VALUES
  #======================================================

  actual3 <- test_3$visits

  #======================================================
  # CONFORMAL RESIDUALS
  #======================================================

  resid_nn3 <- abs(
    actual3 -
      pred_nn3
  )

  resid_nn3 <- resid_nn3[
    is.finite(resid_nn3)
  ]

  #======================================================
  # CONFORMAL QUANTILE
  #======================================================

  qhat_nn3 <- quantile(
    resid_nn3,
    probs = 0.95,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )

  #======================================================
  # PREDICTION INTERVALS
  #======================================================

  lower_nn3 <- pred_nn3 -
    qhat_nn3

  upper_nn3 <- pred_nn3 +
    qhat_nn3

  #======================================================
  # NONNEGATIVE COUNTS
  #======================================================

  lower_nn3 <- pmax(
    0,
    round(lower_nn3)
  )

  upper_nn3 <- round(
    upper_nn3
  )

  #======================================================
  # COVERAGE
  #======================================================

  coverage_nn3 <- mean(
    actual3 >= lower_nn3 &
      actual3 <= upper_nn3
  )

  #======================================================
  # WIDTH
  #======================================================

  width_nn3 <- mean(
    upper_nn3 -
      lower_nn3
  )

  #======================================================
  # ACCURACY MEASURES
  #======================================================

  acc_nn3 <- as.data.frame(
    forecast::accuracy(
      pred_nn3,
      actual3
    )
  )

  #======================================================
  # STORE RESULTS
  #======================================================

  results_nn3 <- rbind(
    results_nn3,
    data.frame(
      Replication = i,
      Coverage = coverage_nn3,
      Width = width_nn3,
      ME = acc_nn3["Test set","ME"],
      RMSE = acc_nn3["Test set","RMSE"],
      MAE = acc_nn3["Test set","MAE"],
      MAPE = acc_nn3["Test set","MAPE"]
    )
  )

  #======================================================
  # PRINT RESULTS
  #======================================================

  cat(
    "RMSE :",
    round(
      acc_nn3["Test set","RMSE"],
      4
    ),
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "MAE :",
    round(
      acc_nn3["Test set","MAE"],
      4
    ),
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "Coverage :",
    round(
      coverage_nn3,
      4
    ),
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "Width :",
    round(
      width_nn3,
      4
    ),
    "\n"
  )

}

#========================================================
# FINAL SUMMARY
#========================================================

summary_nn3 <- data.frame(

  Mean_Coverage =
    mean(
      results_nn3$Coverage,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),

  Mean_Width =
    mean(
      results_nn3$Width,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),

  Mean_ME =
    mean(
      results_nn3$ME,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),

  Mean_RMSE =
    mean(
      results_nn3$RMSE,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),

  Mean_MAE =
    mean(
      results_nn3$MAE,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),

  Mean_MAPE =
    mean(
      results_nn3$MAPE,
      na.rm = TRUE
    )
)

summary_nn3

```


#ML MODEL COMPARISON
```{r}
#========================================================
# MACHINE LEARNING MODEL COMPARISON
# 70:30 SPLIT
#========================================================

library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

compare_ml_70 <- data.frame(

  Model = c(
    "Random Forest",
    "XGBoost",
    "LightGBM",
    "GLMNET",
    "Neural Network"
  ),

  RMSE = c(
    summary_rf1$Mean_RMSE,
    summary_xgb1$Mean_RMSE,
    summary_lgb1$Mean_RMSE,
    summary_glmnet1$Mean_RMSE,
    summary_nn1$Mean_RMSE
  ),

  MAE = c(
    summary_rf1$Mean_MAE,
    summary_xgb1$Mean_MAE,
    summary_lgb1$Mean_MAE,
    summary_glmnet1$Mean_MAE,
    summary_nn1$Mean_MAE
  ),

  ME = c(
    summary_rf1$Mean_ME,
    summary_xgb1$Mean_ME,
    summary_lgb1$Mean_ME,
    summary_glmnet1$Mean_ME,
    summary_nn1$Mean_ME
  ),

  Coverage = c(
    summary_rf1$Mean_Coverage,
    summary_xgb1$Mean_Coverage,
    summary_lgb1$Mean_Coverage,
    summary_glmnet1$Mean_Coverage,
    summary_nn1$Mean_Coverage
  ),

  Width = c(
    summary_rf1$Mean_Width,
    summary_xgb1$Mean_Width,
    summary_lgb1$Mean_Width,
    summary_glmnet1$Mean_Width,
    summary_nn1$Mean_Width
  )
)

#========================================================
# ROUND VALUES
#========================================================

compare_ml_70[,2:6] <- round(
  compare_ml_70[,2:6],
  4
)

#========================================================
# RANKS
#========================================================

compare_ml_70$RMSE_Rank <- rank(
  compare_ml_70$RMSE,
  ties.method = "min"
)

compare_ml_70$MAE_Rank <- rank(
  compare_ml_70$MAE,
  ties.method = "min"
)

compare_ml_70$Coverage_Rank <- rank(
  -compare_ml_70$Coverage,
  ties.method = "min"
)

compare_ml_70$Width_Rank <- rank(
  compare_ml_70$Width,
  ties.method = "min"
)

#========================================================
# OVERALL SCORE
#========================================================

compare_ml_70$Overall_Score <-

  compare_ml_70$RMSE_Rank +

  compare_ml_70$MAE_Rank +

  compare_ml_70$Coverage_Rank +

  compare_ml_70$Width_Rank

#========================================================
# OVERALL RANK
#========================================================

compare_ml_70$Overall_Rank <- rank(
  compare_ml_70$Overall_Score,
  ties.method = "min"
)

#========================================================
# SORT TABLE
#========================================================

compare_ml_70 <- compare_ml_70[
  order(compare_ml_70$Overall_Rank),
]

rownames(compare_ml_70) <- NULL

#========================================================
# FINAL TABLE
#========================================================

compare_ml_70_final <- compare_ml_70[,c(
  "Overall_Rank",
  "Model",
  "RMSE",
  "RMSE_Rank",
  "MAE",
  "MAE_Rank",
  "ME",
  "Coverage",
  "Coverage_Rank",
  "Width",
  "Width_Rank"
)]

compare_ml_70_final

#========================================================
# EXPORT TO OVERLEAF
#========================================================

latex_ml70 <- kable(
  compare_ml_70_final,
  format = "latex",
  booktabs = TRUE,
  align = "c",
  caption = "Comparison of Machine Learning Models under the 70:30 Train--Test Split",
  label = "tab:ml70"
)

writeLines(
  latex_ml70,
  "compare_ml_70.tex"
)

#========================================================
# DISPLAY IN R
```
