```{r}
#========================================================

kable(
  compare_ml_70_final,
  caption = "Comparison of Machine Learning Models under the 70:30 Train--Test Split",
  align = "c"
) %>%
  kable_styling(
    full_width = FALSE,
    bootstrap_options = c(
      "striped",
      "hover",
      "condensed"
    )
  )

cat(
  "\nTable exported successfully as:\n",
  "compare_ml_70.tex\n",
  "Use in Overleaf:\n",
  "\\input{compare_ml_70.tex}\n"
)

```

#80
```{r}
#========================================================
# MACHINE LEARNING MODEL COMPARISON
# 80:20 SPLIT
#========================================================

library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

compare_ml_80 <- data.frame(

  Model = c(
    "Random Forest",
    "XGBoost",
    "LightGBM",
    "GLMNET",
    "Neural Network"
  ),

  RMSE = c(
    summary_rf2$Mean_RMSE,
    summary_xgb2$Mean_RMSE,
    summary_lgb2$Mean_RMSE,
    summary_glmnet2$Mean_RMSE,
    summary_nn2$Mean_RMSE
  ),

  MAE = c(
    summary_rf2$Mean_MAE,
    summary_xgb2$Mean_MAE,
    summary_lgb2$Mean_MAE,
    summary_glmnet2$Mean_MAE,
    summary_nn2$Mean_MAE
  ),

  ME = c(
    summary_rf2$Mean_ME,
    summary_xgb2$Mean_ME,
    summary_lgb2$Mean_ME,
    summary_glmnet2$Mean_ME,
    summary_nn2$Mean_ME
  ),

  Coverage = c(
    summary_rf2$Mean_Coverage,
    summary_xgb2$Mean_Coverage,
    summary_lgb2$Mean_Coverage,
    summary_glmnet2$Mean_Coverage,
    summary_nn2$Mean_Coverage
  ),

  Width = c(
    summary_rf2$Mean_Width,
    summary_xgb2$Mean_Width,
    summary_lgb2$Mean_Width,
    summary_glmnet2$Mean_Width,
    summary_nn2$Mean_Width
  )
)

compare_ml_80[,2:6] <- round(
  compare_ml_80[,2:6],
  4
)

compare_ml_80$RMSE_Rank <- rank(
  compare_ml_80$RMSE,
  ties.method = "min"
)

compare_ml_80$MAE_Rank <- rank(
  compare_ml_80$MAE,
  ties.method = "min"
)

compare_ml_80$Coverage_Rank <- rank(
  -compare_ml_80$Coverage,
  ties.method = "min"
)

compare_ml_80$Width_Rank <- rank(
  compare_ml_80$Width,
  ties.method = "min"
)

compare_ml_80$Overall_Score <-
  compare_ml_80$RMSE_Rank +
  compare_ml_80$MAE_Rank +
  compare_ml_80$Coverage_Rank +
  compare_ml_80$Width_Rank

compare_ml_80$Overall_Rank <- rank(
  compare_ml_80$Overall_Score,
  ties.method = "min"
)

compare_ml_80 <- compare_ml_80[
  order(compare_ml_80$Overall_Rank),
]

rownames(compare_ml_80) <- NULL

compare_ml_80_final <- compare_ml_80[,c(
  "Overall_Rank",
  "Model",
  "RMSE",
  "RMSE_Rank",
  "MAE",
  "MAE_Rank",
  "ME",
  "Coverage",
  "Coverage_Rank",
  "Width",
  "Width_Rank"
)]

compare_ml_80_final

latex_ml80 <- kable(
  compare_ml_80_final,
  format = "latex",
  booktabs = TRUE,
  align = "c",
  caption = "Comparison of Machine Learning Models under the 80:20 Train--Test Split",
  label = "tab:ml80"
)

writeLines(
  latex_ml80,
  "compare_ml_80.tex"
)

cat(
  "\nTable exported successfully as:\n",
  "compare_ml_80.tex\n",
  "Use in Overleaf:\n",
  "\\input{compare_ml_80.tex}\n"
)
```

#90
```{r}
#========================================================
# MACHINE LEARNING MODEL COMPARISON
# 90:10 SPLIT
#========================================================

library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

compare_ml_90 <- data.frame(

  Model = c(
    "Random Forest",
    "XGBoost",
    "LightGBM",
    "GLMNET",
    "Neural Network"
  ),

  RMSE = c(
    summary_rf3$Mean_RMSE,
    summary_xgb3$Mean_RMSE,
    summary_lgb3$Mean_RMSE,
    summary_glmnet3$Mean_RMSE,
    summary_nn3$Mean_RMSE
  ),

  MAE = c(
    summary_rf3$Mean_MAE,
    summary_xgb3$Mean_MAE,
    summary_lgb3$Mean_MAE,
    summary_glmnet3$Mean_MAE,
    summary_nn3$Mean_MAE
  ),

  ME = c(
    summary_rf3$Mean_ME,
    summary_xgb3$Mean_ME,
    summary_lgb3$Mean_ME,
    summary_glmnet3$Mean_ME,
    summary_nn3$Mean_ME
  ),

  Coverage = c(
    summary_rf3$Mean_Coverage,
    summary_xgb3$Mean_Coverage,
    summary_lgb3$Mean_Coverage,
    summary_glmnet3$Mean_Coverage,
    summary_nn3$Mean_Coverage
  ),

  Width = c(
    summary_rf3$Mean_Width,
    summary_xgb3$Mean_Width,
    summary_lgb3$Mean_Width,
    summary_glmnet3$Mean_Width,
    summary_nn3$Mean_Width
  )
)

compare_ml_90[,2:6] <- round(
  compare_ml_90[,2:6],
  4
)

compare_ml_90$RMSE_Rank <- rank(
  compare_ml_90$RMSE,
  ties.method = "min"
)

compare_ml_90$MAE_Rank <- rank(
  compare_ml_90$MAE,
  ties.method = "min"
)

compare_ml_90$Coverage_Rank <- rank(
  -compare_ml_90$Coverage,
  ties.method = "min"
)

compare_ml_90$Width_Rank <- rank(
  compare_ml_90$Width,
  ties.method = "min"
)

compare_ml_90$Overall_Score <-
  compare_ml_90$RMSE_Rank +
  compare_ml_90$MAE_Rank +
  compare_ml_90$Coverage_Rank +
  compare_ml_90$Width_Rank

compare_ml_90$Overall_Rank <- rank(
  compare_ml_90$Overall_Score,
  ties.method = "min"
)

compare_ml_90 <- compare_ml_90[
  order(compare_ml_90$Overall_Rank),
]

rownames(compare_ml_90) <- NULL

compare_ml_90_final <- compare_ml_90[,c(
  "Overall_Rank",
  "Model",
  "RMSE",
  "RMSE_Rank",
  "MAE",
  "MAE_Rank",
  "ME",
  "Coverage",
  "Coverage_Rank",
  "Width",
  "Width_Rank"
)]

compare_ml_90_final

latex_ml90 <- kable(
  compare_ml_90_final,
  format = "latex",
  booktabs = TRUE,
  align = "c",
  caption = "Comparison of Machine Learning Models under the 90:10 Train--Test Split",
  label = "tab:ml90"
)

writeLines(
  latex_ml90,
  "compare_ml_90.tex"
)

cat(
  "\nTable exported successfully as:\n",
  "compare_ml_90.tex\n",
  "Use in Overleaf:\n",
  "\\input{compare_ml_90.tex}\n"
)
```
